plugin.name: leveldb
plugin.author: Rodarvus
plugin.purpose: A simple leveling database for Aardwolf

trigger.name: trg_ldb_powerup
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, .+\. You have increased your powerups to (\d+)\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_pup_trains_lucky
trigger.match: ^Lucky! You gain an extra (\d+) training sessions?!$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_cp_start
trigger.match: ^(.+) tells you 'Good luck in your campaign!'$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_cp_mob_killed
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, that was one of your CAMPAIGN mobs!$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_cp_complete
trigger.match: CONGRATULATIONS! You have completed your campaign.

trigger.name: trg_ldb_cpinfo_none
trigger.match: ^You are not currently on a campaign\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gq_mob_killed
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, that was one of the GLOBAL QUEST mobs!$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gq_won
trigger.match: ^You were the first to complete this quest!$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gq_ended
trigger.match: ^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+)(?: \(extended\))? is now over\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gq_cancelled
trigger.match: ^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+) has been cancelled due to lack of activity\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gq_quit
trigger.match: ^You are no longer part of Global Quest # (\d+) and will be unable to rejoin\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gq_not_in_1
trigger.match: ^You are not in a global quest\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gqinfo_none
trigger.match: ^You are not in a global quest\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gqinfo_multi
trigger.match: ^There is more than one global quest running\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gqinfo_gag
trigger.match: ^(?:-+\[|Quest (?:Name|Type|Status|Duration)|Level range|Time (?:to Start|Expired|Remaining)|Inactivity Timer|Kill at least|Use syntax: 'gquest)

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gqcheck_none
trigger.match: ^You are not in a global quest\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gqcheck_gag
trigger.match: ^(?:Index\s+Target|-{20,}|Note: Dead means|You may win|You can be rewarded)

trigger.name: trg_ldb_level_up
trigger.match: ^You raise a level! You are now level (\d+)\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_level_gains
trigger.match: ^You gain (\d+) hit points, (\d+) mana, (\d+) moves, (\d+) practices? and (\d+) trains?\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_level_gains_instinct
trigger.match: ^You gain (\d+) hit points, (\d+) mana, (\d+) moves, (\d+) practices?, (\d+) trains? and (\d+) instinct trains?\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gold_shared
trigger.match: ^.* shares [0-9,]+ gold(?: coins?)? with .*\. Your share is ([0-9,]+) gold(?: coins?)?\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gold_haggle
trigger.match: ^You haggle with .* for an extra ([0-9,]+) gold\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gold_db_kill
trigger.match: ^Your daily blessing added ([0-9,]+) gold to the corpse\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gold_tax
trigger.match: ^You are taxed ([0-9,]+) gold(?: coins?)? by your clan\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gold_epic_suit
trigger.match: ^A man in a suit gives you ([0-9,]+) gold\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_gold_epic_gods
trigger.match: ^The gods award you with(?: an additional)? ([0-9,]+) gold coins\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_tp_mob
trigger.match: ^You killed a Trivia Point bonus mob!! Trivia point added\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_tp_db
trigger.match: ^[\w\s]+ blesses you with a trivia point!$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_tp_epic_token
trigger.match: ^The gods award you with a(?:n additional)? Trivia Point Token\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_tp_epic_fractal
trigger.match: ^You receive a Fractal Trivia Point Token from the Luminous Fractal\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_tp_epic_skd
trigger.match: ^You receive Sea King's Trivia Point Token from Spectre of the Deep\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_tp_epic_dunes
trigger.match: ^You manage to loot a .+ Trivia Point Token from the lair\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_qp_db
trigger.match: ^.* blesses you with (\d+) bonus quest points\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_train_db
trigger.match: ^You gain (\d+) extra trains? daily blessing bonus\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_train_epic_gods
trigger.match: ^The gods award you with(?: an additional)? ([0-9,]+) training sessions\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_train_epic_suit
trigger.match: ^A man in a suit gives you ([0-9,]+) trains\.$

trigger.name: trg_ldb_train_instinct_deposit
trigger.match: ^You deposit (\d+) trains? for later use on instinct\.$

muclient.script:
require "gmcphelper" local async_ok, async = pcall(require, "async")
-- ============================================================================= -- Constants -- ============================================================================= local GMCP_HANDLER_ID = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" local DB_DIR = "state\\leveldb\\" local DB_FILENAME = "leveldb.db" local PREFIX = "[LevelDB] " local UPDATE_URL = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rodarvus/leveldb/main/leveldb.xml"
-- ============================================================================= -- Plugin state (persisted via save_state) -- ============================================================================= local enabled = false
-- ============================================================================= -- Database state -- ============================================================================= local db = nil -- SQLite database handle local db_path = nil -- Full path to database
-- ============================================================================= -- GMCP cached values (updated on each broadcast) -- ============================================================================= local cached_tier = nil local cached_remorts = nil local cached_redos = nil local cached_pups = nil local cached_perlevel = 1000 local cached_level = nil local cached_tnl = nil local cached_zone = nil local cached_room_num = nil local cached_room_name = nil local cached_enemy = "" -- ============================================================================= -- Pup tracking state -- ============================================================================= local last_pup_event_id = nil -- DB id of most recent pup_events row (for train UPDATE)
-- ============================================================================= -- Level-up tracking state -- ============================================================================= local pending_level_id = nil -- DB id of most recent level_events row awaiting per-level gain update
-- ============================================================================= -- Quest/Campaign tracking state -- ============================================================================= local active_quest_id = nil -- DB id of open quest (nil if none) local active_campaign_id = nil -- DB id of open campaign (nil if none) local cpinfo_mob_buffer = {} -- temp buffer for mob list during cp info parse local cpinfo_level = nil -- Level Taken from cp info (for matching) local cpinfo_qp = nil -- Quest Points from cp info (for matching) local cpinfo_gold = nil -- Gold Coins from cp info
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest tracking state -- ============================================================================= local active_gquest_id = nil -- DB id of open gquest (nil if none) local gqinfo_mob_buffer = {} -- temp buffer for mob list during gq check parse local gqinfo_qp = nil -- base QP from gq info local gqinfo_gold = nil -- gold from gq info local gqinfo_gq_number = nil -- gq number from gq info (for reconnect matching) local gqinfo_status = nil -- Quest Status from gq info (Preparing/Active/Running/Extended/Finished) local gqinfo_pracs = nil -- Practice Sessions from gq info local gqinfo_trains = nil -- Training Sessions from gq info local gqinfo_tp = nil -- Trivia points from gq info
-- ============================================================================= -- Combat tracking state -- ============================================================================= local in_combat = false local death_flag = false local fight_start = nil -- Snapshot at combat start: {tnl, level, zone, room_num, room_name, enemy, pup} local damage_total = 0 -- Accumulated damage from [damage] lines this fight local round_count = 0 -- Number of enemypct changes this fight local last_enemypct = nil -- For dedup of multiple char.status per round local sacrifice_mob_level = nil -- Estimated mob level from sacrifice gold * 2
-- ============================================================================= -- Database helpers (following aard_GMCP_mapper.xml patterns) -- ============================================================================= local function dbcheck(code, msg, query) if code ~= sqlite3.OK and code ~= sqlite3.ROW and code ~= sqlite3.DONE then local err = (msg or "unknown") .. "\nCODE: " .. (code or "?") .. "\nQUERY: " .. (query or "?") if db then db:exec("ROLLBACK") end ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "SQL Error: " .. err) return true -- error occurred end return false -- no error end
local function fixsql(s) if s then return "'" .. (string.gsub(s, "'", "''")) .. "'" else return "NULL" end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Schema initialization (split into tables, migrations, indexes) -- ============================================================================= local function init_tables() local sql = [[ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kills ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, mob_name TEXT NOT NULL, zone TEXT NOT NULL, room_num INTEGER, room_name TEXT, level INTEGER NOT NULL, xp_gained INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, damage_total INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, rounds INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER, pup INTEGER, mob_level INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deaths ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, mob_name TEXT, zone TEXT NOT NULL, room_num INTEGER, room_name TEXT, level INTEGER NOT NULL, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quests ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, level INTEGER NOT NULL, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER, mob_name TEXT, area TEXT, room TEXT, timer INTEGER, result TEXT, duration INTEGER, qp INTEGER, gold INTEGER, tp INTEGER, trains INTEGER, pracs INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS campaigns ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, level INTEGER NOT NULL, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER, result TEXT, duration INTEGER, mob_count INTEGER, qp INTEGER, gold INTEGER, tp INTEGER, trains INTEGER, pracs INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS campaign_mobs ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, campaign_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES campaigns(id), mob_name TEXT NOT NULL, area TEXT );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pup_events ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, tier INTEGER NOT NULL, remort INTEGER NOT NULL, pup_number INTEGER NOT NULL, zone TEXT, trains_earned INTEGER, xp_per_level INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gquests ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, gq_number INTEGER, level INTEGER NOT NULL, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER, redo INTEGER, result TEXT, duration INTEGER, mob_count INTEGER, qp INTEGER, gold INTEGER, tp INTEGER, trains INTEGER, pracs INTEGER, expected_qp INTEGER, expected_gold INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gquest_mobs ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, gquest_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES gquests(id), mob_name TEXT NOT NULL, area TEXT, mob_count INTEGER DEFAULT 1 );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS level_events ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, level INTEGER NOT NULL, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER, redo INTEGER, hp_gained INTEGER, mana_gained INTEGER, moves_gained INTEGER, pracs_gained INTEGER, trains_gained INTEGER, instinct_trains_gained INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, category TEXT NOT NULL, source TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, level INTEGER, tier INTEGER, remort INTEGER, redo INTEGER ); ]] db:exec(sql) return not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "init_tables") end
local function run_migrations() -- Migration: add pup column (v2.0 -> v3.0) db:exec("ALTER TABLE kills ADD COLUMN pup INTEGER") -- Migration: add mob_level column (v3.0 -> v4.0) db:exec("ALTER TABLE kills ADD COLUMN mob_level INTEGER") -- Migration: add expected_qp/expected_gold to campaigns (v6.0) db:exec("ALTER TABLE campaigns ADD COLUMN expected_qp INTEGER") db:exec("ALTER TABLE campaigns ADD COLUMN expected_gold INTEGER") -- Migration: add combat_time column (v6.0 -> v7.0) db:exec("ALTER TABLE kills ADD COLUMN combat_time REAL") -- Migration: add redo column (v7.0 -> v8.0) db:exec("ALTER TABLE kills ADD COLUMN redo INTEGER") db:exec("ALTER TABLE deaths ADD COLUMN redo INTEGER") db:exec("ALTER TABLE quests ADD COLUMN redo INTEGER") db:exec("ALTER TABLE campaigns ADD COLUMN redo INTEGER") db:exec("ALTER TABLE pup_events ADD COLUMN redo INTEGER") -- Errors from "duplicate column name" are silently ignored end
local function init_indexes() local sql = [[ CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_level ON kills(level); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_zone ON kills(zone); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_mob ON kills(mob_name); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_timestamp ON kills(timestamp); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_tier ON kills(tier); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_remort ON kills(remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_pup ON kills(pup); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_mob_level ON kills(mob_level); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deaths_level ON deaths(level); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deaths_zone ON deaths(zone); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deaths_tier ON deaths(tier); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deaths_remort ON deaths(remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_level ON quests(level); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_tier ON quests(tier); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_remort ON quests(remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_campaigns_level ON campaigns(level); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_campaigns_tier ON campaigns(tier); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_campaigns_remort ON campaigns(remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_campaign_mobs_cid ON campaign_mobs(campaign_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pup_events_tier_remort ON pup_events(tier, remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_kills_redo ON kills(redo); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deaths_redo ON deaths(redo); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_redo ON quests(redo); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_campaigns_redo ON campaigns(redo); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pup_events_redo ON pup_events(redo); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gquests_level ON gquests(level); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gquests_tier ON gquests(tier); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gquests_remort ON gquests(remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gquests_redo ON gquests(redo); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gquest_mobs_gqid ON gquest_mobs(gquest_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_level_events_ts ON level_events(timestamp); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_level_events_tier_remort ON level_events(tier, remort); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_ts ON events(timestamp); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_cat_src ON events(category, source); ]] db:exec(sql) return not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "init_indexes") end
-- ============================================================================= -- Database open/close -- ============================================================================= local function close_db() if db then db:close() db = nil db_path = nil end end
local function open_db() if db then return true end
local dir = GetInfo(60) .. DB_DIR os.execute('if not exist "' .. dir .. '" mkdir "' .. dir .. '"') local path = dir .. DB_FILENAME
local handle, err_msg, err_code = sqlite3.open(path) if not handle then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Failed to open database: " .. (err_msg or "unknown error")) return false end
db = handle db_path = path
if not init_tables() then close_db() return false end
run_migrations()
if not init_indexes() then close_db() return false end
return true end
-- ============================================================================= -- Combat state management -- ============================================================================= local function start_fight(enemy_name) in_combat = true death_flag = false damage_total = 0 round_count = 0 last_enemypct = nil last_pup_event_id = nil -- pup reward lines are done once combat resumes sacrifice_mob_level = nil
fight_start = { tnl = cached_tnl, level = cached_level, zone = cached_zone or "Unknown", room_num = cached_room_num, room_name = cached_room_name, enemy = enemy_name, pup = cached_pups, start_time = utils.timer(), } end
local function record_kill() if not fight_start then return end if not db then return end if not enabled then return end
-- Calculate XP gained local xp_gained = 0 if fight_start.tnl and cached_tnl and fight_start.level and cached_level then if cached_level > fight_start.level then -- Leveled up during combat (1-199) xp_gained = fight_start.tnl + (cached_perlevel - cached_tnl) elseif fight_start.level >= 200 and cached_tnl > fight_start.tnl then -- Powerup during combat (200/201: TNL reset without level change) xp_gained = fight_start.tnl + (cached_perlevel - cached_tnl) elseif cached_level == fight_start.level then -- Normal kill (same level/pup, no reset) xp_gained = fight_start.tnl - cached_tnl end if xp_gained < 0 then xp_gained = 0 end end
local combat_time = nil if fight_start.start_time then combat_time = utils.timer() - fight_start.start_time if combat_time < 0 then combat_time = nil end end
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO kills (timestamp, mob_name, zone, room_num, room_name, level, " .. "xp_gained, damage_total, rounds, tier, remort, pup, mob_level, combat_time, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %d, %d, %d, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), fixsql(fight_start.enemy), fixsql(fight_start.zone), fight_start.room_num and tostring(fight_start.room_num) or "NULL", fixsql(fight_start.room_name), fight_start.level or 0, xp_gained, damage_total, round_count, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", fight_start.pup and tostring(fight_start.pup) or "NULL", sacrifice_mob_level and tostring(sacrifice_mob_level) or "NULL", combat_time and string.format("%.3f", combat_time) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL" )
db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
local function record_death() if not db then return end if not enabled then return end
local enemy = (in_combat and fight_start) and fight_start.enemy or cached_enemy
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO deaths (timestamp, mob_name, zone, room_num, room_name, level, tier, remort, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %d, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), fixsql(enemy), fixsql(cached_zone or "Unknown"), cached_room_num and tostring(cached_room_num) or "NULL", fixsql(cached_room_name), cached_level or 0, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL" )
db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
local function record_pup_event(pup_data, trains_earned) if not db then return end if not enabled then return end
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO pup_events (timestamp, tier, remort, pup_number, zone, " .. "trains_earned, xp_per_level, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s)", pup_data.timestamp, pup_data.tier and tostring(pup_data.tier) or "0", pup_data.remort and tostring(pup_data.remort) or "0", pup_data.pup_number, fixsql(pup_data.zone), trains_earned and tostring(trains_earned) or "NULL", pup_data.xp_per_level and tostring(pup_data.xp_per_level) or "NULL", pup_data.redo and tostring(pup_data.redo) or "NULL" )
db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
-- Record a generic reward event (gold/tp/qp/train/prac) into the events table local function record_event(category, source, amount) if not db then return end if not enabled then return end if not amount or amount == 0 then return end
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO events (timestamp, category, source, amount, level, tier, remort, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), fixsql(category), fixsql(source), amount, cached_level and tostring(cached_level) or "NULL", cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL" )
db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
-- Insert a level_events row, return the new row id (for the per-level gain UPDATE) local function record_level_event(level) if not db then return nil end if not enabled then return nil end
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO level_events (timestamp, level, tier, remort, redo) VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), level, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL" )
db:exec(query) if dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then return nil end return db:last_insert_rowid() end
-- Update a level_events row with the per-level stat gains local function update_level_event_gains(level_event_id, hp, mana, moves, pracs, trains, instinct_trains) if not db then return end if not level_event_id then return end
local query = string.format( "UPDATE level_events SET hp_gained = %s, mana_gained = %s, moves_gained = %s, " .. "pracs_gained = %s, trains_gained = %s, instinct_trains_gained = %s WHERE id = %d", hp and tostring(hp) or "NULL", mana and tostring(mana) or "NULL", moves and tostring(moves) or "NULL", pracs and tostring(pracs) or "NULL", trains and tostring(trains) or "NULL", instinct_trains and tostring(instinct_trains) or "NULL", level_event_id )
db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
local function end_combat() in_combat = false fight_start = nil damage_total = 0 round_count = 0 last_enemypct = nil sacrifice_mob_level = nil end
-- ============================================================================= -- GMCP broadcast handler -- ============================================================================= function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if id ~= GMCP_HANDLER_ID then return end
if text == "char.base" then local base = gmcp("char.base") if base then if base.perlevel then cached_perlevel = tonumber(base.perlevel) or 1000 end if base.tier then cached_tier = tonumber(base.tier) end if base.remorts then cached_remorts = tonumber(base.remorts) end if base.redos then cached_redos = tonumber(base.redos) end if base.pups then cached_pups = tonumber(base.pups) end end
elseif text == "char.status" then local status = gmcp("char.status") if not status then return end
-- Update cached values local new_level = tonumber(status.level) local new_tnl = tonumber(status.tnl) if new_level and new_level ~= -1 then cached_level = new_level end if new_tnl and new_tnl ~= -1 then cached_tnl = new_tnl end
local new_enemy = status.enemy or ""
-- State machine transitions if not enabled then cached_enemy = new_enemy return end
if not in_combat then -- IDLE state if new_enemy ~= "" then -- Transition 1: IDLE --> COMBAT start_fight(new_enemy) end else -- COMBAT state if death_flag then if new_enemy == "" then end_combat() end cached_enemy = new_enemy return end
if new_enemy == "" then -- Transition 3: COMBAT --> KILL_RECORDED --> IDLE record_kill() end_combat()
elseif new_enemy ~= cached_enemy and cached_enemy ~= "" then -- Transition 4: COMBAT --> KILL_RECORDED --> COMBAT (enemy switch) record_kill() start_fight(new_enemy)
else -- Transition 2: COMBAT --> COMBAT (same enemy) local new_pct = tonumber(status.enemypct) if new_pct and last_enemypct and new_pct > last_enemypct then -- Health went UP with same name = previous mob died, new mob engaged record_kill() start_fight(new_enemy) elseif new_pct and new_pct ~= last_enemypct then round_count = round_count + 1 last_enemypct = new_pct end end end
cached_enemy = new_enemy
elseif text == "room.info" then local room = gmcp("room.info") if room then cached_zone = room.zone cached_room_num = tonumber(room.num) cached_room_name = room.name end
elseif text == "comm.quest" then local quest_data = gmcp("comm.quest") if quest_data then handle_quest(quest_data) end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Text trigger handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_damage_line(name, line, wildcards) if not in_combat then return end if not enabled then return end
local dmg = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if dmg then damage_total = damage_total + dmg end end
function ldb_on_player_death(name, line, wildcards) if not enabled then return end if death_flag then return end -- Guard against double-fire
death_flag = true record_death() end
function ldb_on_sacrifice(name, line, wildcards) if not enabled then return end
local gold = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if gold then sacrifice_mob_level = gold * 2 record_event("gold", "sac", gold) end end
function ldb_on_powerup(name, line, wildcards) if not enabled then return end if not db then return end
local pup_number = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not pup_number then return end
-- Update cached pups cached_pups = pup_number
-- Record pup event immediately with trains_earned = 0 -- Train text triggers will UPDATE this record to add trains record_pup_event({ timestamp = os.time(), tier = cached_tier, remort = cached_remorts, redo = cached_redos, pup_number = pup_number, zone = cached_zone or "Unknown", xp_per_level = cached_perlevel, }, 0) last_pup_event_id = db:last_insert_rowid()
-- Clear last_pup_event_id after 1 second to prevent quest/other train -- messages from being attributed to this pup. Pup train lines arrive -- in the same server packet (milliseconds), so 1s is generous. DoAfterSpecial(1, "last_pup_event_id = nil", 12) -- 12 = sendto.script end
function ldb_on_pup_trains(name, line, wildcards) if not enabled then return end if not db then return end if not last_pup_event_id then return end
local trains = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not trains or trains <= 0 then return end
db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE pup_events SET trains_earned = COALESCE(trains_earned, 0) + %d WHERE id = %d", trains, last_pup_event_id)) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Level-up: two-line capture -- Line 1: "You raise a level! You are now level N." -- INSERT -- Line 2: "You gain X hp, Y mana, Z moves, P practice and T train(s)." -- UPDATE -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_level_up(name, line, wildcards) if not enabled then return end if not db then return end
local level = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not level then return end
pending_level_id = record_level_event(level)
-- Safety: clear pending id after 2s in case the gain line never arrives DoAfterSpecial(2, "pending_level_id = nil", 12) -- 12 = sendto.script end
function ldb_on_level_gains(name, line, wildcards) if not enabled then return end if not db then return end if not pending_level_id then return end
local hp = tonumber(wildcards[1]) local mana = tonumber(wildcards[2]) local moves = tonumber(wildcards[3]) local pracs = tonumber(wildcards[4]) local trains = tonumber(wildcards[5]) local itrains = tonumber(wildcards[6]) -- nil if not present
update_level_event_gains(pending_level_id, hp, mana, moves, pracs, trains, itrains) pending_level_id = nil end
-- ============================================================================= -- Generic event triggers — gold/tp/qp/train/prac wrappers -- ============================================================================= local function clean_amount(s) if not s then return nil end return tonumber((s:gsub(",", ""))) end
function ldb_on_gold_mob(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "mob", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_crumble(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "crumble", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_shared(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "shared", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_sell(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "sell", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_fence(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "fence", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_haggle(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "haggle", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_db_bless(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "db_bless", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_gold_db_kill(name, line, wildcards) -- Corpse gold from "You get N gold coins from .." already INCLUDES this DB bonus. -- Insert two rows: +n attributed to db_kill, -n to offset the mob row. local n = clean_amount(wildcards[1]) if not n or n == 0 then return end record_event("gold", "db_kill", n) record_event("gold", "mob", -n) end function ldb_on_gold_tax(name, line, wildcards) local n = clean_amount(wildcards[1]) if n then record_event("gold", "tax", -n) end end function ldb_on_gold_epic(name, line, wildcards) record_event("gold", "epic", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end
function ldb_on_tp_mob(name, line, wildcards) record_event("tp", "mob", 1) end function ldb_on_tp_db(name, line, wildcards) record_event("tp", "db", 1) end function ldb_on_tp_epic(name, line, wildcards) record_event("tp", "epic", 1) end
function ldb_on_qp_db(name, line, wildcards) record_event("qp", "db", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_qp_epic(name, line, wildcards) if active_quest_id then return end record_event("qp", "epic", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end
function ldb_on_train_db(name, line, wildcards) record_event("train", "db", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_train_epic(name, line, wildcards) record_event("train", "epic", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end function ldb_on_train_instinct_deposit(name, line, wildcards) record_event("train", "instinct_deposit", clean_amount(wildcards[1])) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Quest/Campaign: close open quest/campaign as 'unknown' -- ============================================================================= local function close_open_quest() if not active_quest_id or not db then return end local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE quests SET result = 'unknown', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_quest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "close_open_quest") active_quest_id = nil end
local function close_open_campaign() if not active_campaign_id or not db then return end local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE campaigns SET result = 'unknown', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_campaign_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "close_open_campaign") active_campaign_id = nil end
local function close_open_gquest() if not active_gquest_id or not db then return end local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET result = 'unknown', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "close_open_gquest") active_gquest_id = nil end
-- ============================================================================= -- Quest/Campaign: cp info silent parsing helpers -- ============================================================================= local function enable_cpinfo_parsing() cpinfo_mob_buffer = {} cpinfo_level = nil cpinfo_qp = nil cpinfo_gold = nil EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_none", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_level", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_qp", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_gold", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_mob", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_end", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_gag", true) end
local function disable_cpinfo_parsing() EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_none", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_level", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_qp", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_gold", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_mob", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_end", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cpinfo_gag", false) end
local function send_silent_cp_info() enable_cpinfo_parsing() SendNoEcho("cp info") end
local function flush_cpinfo_mob_buffer() if not active_campaign_id or not db then return end if #cpinfo_mob_buffer == 0 then return end
-- Delete old mobs for this campaign and re-insert db:exec(string.format("DELETE FROM campaign_mobs WHERE campaign_id = %d", active_campaign_id))
for _, mob in ipairs(cpinfo_mob_buffer) do local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO campaign_mobs (campaign_id, mob_name, area) VALUES (%d, %s, %s)", active_campaign_id, fixsql(mob.name), fixsql(mob.area)) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
-- Update mob_count and expected rewards on campaign local query = string.format( "UPDATE campaigns SET mob_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaign_mobs WHERE campaign_id = %d), " .. "expected_qp = %s, expected_gold = %s WHERE id = %d", active_campaign_id, cpinfo_qp and tostring(cpinfo_qp) or "NULL", cpinfo_gold and tostring(cpinfo_gold) or "NULL", active_campaign_id) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Quest: GMCP comm.quest handler -- ============================================================================= function handle_quest(data) if not data or not data.action then return end if not db then return end if not enabled then return end
local action = data.action
if action == "start" then -- New quest assigned close_open_quest() local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO quests (timestamp, level, tier, remort, mob_name, area, room, timer, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), cached_level or 0, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", fixsql(data.targ), fixsql(data.area), fixsql(data.room), data.timer and tostring(data.timer) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL") db:exec(query) if not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then active_quest_id = db:last_insert_rowid() end
elseif action == "comp" then -- Quest completed if active_quest_id then local now = os.time() local query = string.format( "UPDATE quests SET result = 'completed', duration = %d - timestamp, " .. "qp = %s, gold = %s, tp = %s, trains = %s, pracs = %s " .. "WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, tonumber(data.totqp) and tostring(data.totqp) or "NULL", tonumber(data.gold) and tostring(data.gold) or "NULL", tonumber(data.tp) and tostring(data.tp) or "NULL", tonumber(data.trains) and tostring(data.trains) or "NULL", tonumber(data.pracs) and tostring(data.pracs) or "NULL", active_quest_id) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) active_quest_id = nil end
elseif action == "fail" then if active_quest_id then local now = os.time() local query = string.format( "UPDATE quests SET result = 'failed', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_quest_id) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) active_quest_id = nil end
elseif action == "timeout" then if active_quest_id then local now = os.time() local query = string.format( "UPDATE quests SET result = 'timeout', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_quest_id) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) active_quest_id = nil end
elseif action == "status" then -- Login/reconnect status check if data.status == "ready" then -- No active quest — close any open record close_open_quest() elseif data.targ and data.targ ~= "missing" and not active_quest_id then -- Active quest found but we have no record — create one local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO quests (timestamp, level, tier, remort, mob_name, area, room, timer, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), cached_level or 0, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", fixsql(data.targ), fixsql(data.area), fixsql(data.room), data.timer and tostring(data.timer) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL") db:exec(query) if not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then active_quest_id = db:last_insert_rowid() end end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Campaign: text trigger handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_cp_start(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not enabled then return end
close_open_campaign()
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO campaigns (timestamp, level, tier, remort, redo) VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), cached_level or 0, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL") db:exec(query) if not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then active_campaign_id = db:last_insert_rowid() end
send_silent_cp_info() end
function ldb_on_cp_mob_killed(name, line, wildcards) -- Trigger kept for potential future use (e.g., kill counting). end
function ldb_on_cp_complete(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_campaign_id then return end
-- Safety: disable cp info parsing if somehow still active disable_cpinfo_parsing()
local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE campaigns SET result = 'completed', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_campaign_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "cp_complete")
-- Enable reward parsing EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cp_reward", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cp_reward_end", true) end
function ldb_on_cp_quit(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_campaign_id then return end
local now = os.time() local query = string.format( "UPDATE campaigns SET result = 'quit', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_campaign_id) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) active_campaign_id = nil end
-- ============================================================================= -- Campaign: silent cp info parsing handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_cpinfo_none(name, line, wildcards) -- "You are not currently on a campaign." disable_cpinfo_parsing() close_open_campaign() end
function ldb_on_cpinfo_level(name, line, wildcards) cpinfo_level = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_cpinfo_qp(name, line, wildcards) cpinfo_qp = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_cpinfo_gold(name, line, wildcards) local gold_str = wildcards[1] if gold_str then cpinfo_gold = tonumber((string.gsub(gold_str, ",", ""))) end end
function ldb_on_cpinfo_mob(name, line, wildcards) local mob_name = wildcards[1] local area = wildcards[2] if mob_name then mob_name = string.match(mob_name, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") -- trim end if area then area = string.match(area, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") end table.insert(cpinfo_mob_buffer, {name = mob_name, area = area}) end
function ldb_on_cpinfo_end(name, line, wildcards) -- Closing separator: end of cp info output disable_cpinfo_parsing()
if #cpinfo_mob_buffer == 0 then return end if not db or not enabled then return end
-- Reconnect scenario: cp info shows an active campaign if not active_campaign_id then -- No saved campaign — create a new record from cp info data local level = cpinfo_level or cached_level or 0 local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO campaigns (timestamp, level, tier, remort, redo) VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), level, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL") db:exec(query) if not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then active_campaign_id = db:last_insert_rowid() end else -- We have a saved campaign — check if it matches local saved_level = nil local saved_qp = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT level, expected_qp FROM campaigns WHERE id = %d", active_campaign_id)) do saved_level = row.level saved_qp = row.expected_qp end
local match = (saved_level == cpinfo_level) if saved_qp and cpinfo_qp then match = match and (saved_qp == cpinfo_qp) end
if not match then -- Different campaign — close old as unknown, create new close_open_campaign() local level = cpinfo_level or cached_level or 0 local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO campaigns (timestamp, level, tier, remort, redo) VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), level, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL") db:exec(query) if not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then active_campaign_id = db:last_insert_rowid() end end -- If match, keep existing active_campaign_id — just refresh mob list end
flush_cpinfo_mob_buffer() end
function ldb_on_cpinfo_gag(name, line, wildcards) -- No-op handler for gagged cp info lines end
-- ============================================================================= -- Campaign: reward parsing handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_cp_reward(name, line, wildcards) if not active_campaign_id or not db then return end
local amount_str = wildcards[1] local rtype = wildcards[2] if not amount_str or not rtype then return end
local amount = tonumber((string.gsub(amount_str, ",", ""))) if not amount then return end
local field = nil if string.find(rtype, "quest point") then field = "qp" elseif string.find(rtype, "gold coin") then field = "gold" elseif string.find(rtype, "trivia point") then field = "tp" elseif string.find(rtype, "training session") then field = "trains" elseif string.find(rtype, "practice") then field = "pracs" end
if field then db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE campaigns SET %s = COALESCE(%s, 0) + %d WHERE id = %d", field, field, amount, active_campaign_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "cp_reward " .. field) end end
function ldb_on_cp_reward_end(name, line, wildcards) -- Closing "---" separator EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cp_reward", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_cp_reward_end", false) active_campaign_id = nil end
-- ============================================================================= -- Campaign: delayed cp info check on plugin load (must be global for DoAfterSpecial) -- ============================================================================= function delayed_cp_info() if not db then return end if not enabled then return end send_silent_cp_info() end
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest: silent gq info/check parsing helpers -- ============================================================================= local function enable_gqinfo_parsing() gqinfo_qp = nil gqinfo_gold = nil gqinfo_pracs = nil gqinfo_trains = nil gqinfo_tp = nil gqinfo_gq_number = nil gqinfo_status = nil EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_none", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_norun", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_multi", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_qn", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_status", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_qp", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_gold", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_pracs", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_trains", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_tp", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_gag", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_end", true) end
local function disable_gqinfo_parsing() EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_none", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_norun", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_multi", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_qn", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_status", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_qp", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_gold", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_pracs", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_trains", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_tp", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_gag", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqinfo_end", false) end
local gqcheck_generation = 0 -- generation counter to ignore stale timeout callbacks
local function enable_gqcheck_parsing() gqinfo_mob_buffer = {} gqcheck_generation = gqcheck_generation + 1 EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_mob", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_mob2", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_none", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_norun", true) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_gag", true) -- Timer-based end detection (no closing separator in gq check output) -- Each mob line resets the timer by bumping generation and scheduling a new timeout DoAfterSpecial(1, "gqcheck_timeout(" .. gqcheck_generation .. ")", 12) end
local function disable_gqcheck_parsing() gqcheck_generation = gqcheck_generation + 1 -- invalidate any pending timeout EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_mob", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_mob2", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_none", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_norun", false) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gqcheck_gag", false) end
local function send_silent_gq_info(gq_number) enable_gqinfo_parsing() if gq_number then SendNoEcho("gq info " .. gq_number) else SendNoEcho("gq info") end end
local function flush_gqcheck_mob_buffer() if not active_gquest_id or not db then return end if #gqinfo_mob_buffer == 0 then return end
-- Delete old mobs for this gquest and re-insert db:exec(string.format("DELETE FROM gquest_mobs WHERE gquest_id = %d", active_gquest_id))
for _, mob in ipairs(gqinfo_mob_buffer) do local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO gquest_mobs (gquest_id, mob_name, area, mob_count) VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %d)", active_gquest_id, fixsql(mob.name), fixsql(mob.area), mob.count or 1) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
-- Update mob_count and expected rewards on gquest local query = string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET mob_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gquest_mobs WHERE gquest_id = %d), " .. "expected_qp = %s, expected_gold = %s WHERE id = %d", active_gquest_id, gqinfo_qp and tostring(gqinfo_qp) or "NULL", gqinfo_gold and tostring(gqinfo_gold) or "NULL", active_gquest_id) db:exec(query) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest: text trigger handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_gq_join(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not enabled then return end
local gq_num = tonumber(wildcards[1])
close_open_gquest()
local query = string.format( "INSERT INTO gquests (timestamp, gq_number, level, tier, remort, redo) " .. "VALUES (%d, %s, %d, %s, %s, %s)", os.time(), gq_num and tostring(gq_num) or "NULL", cached_level or 0, cached_tier and tostring(cached_tier) or "NULL", cached_remorts and tostring(cached_remorts) or "NULL", cached_redos and tostring(cached_redos) or "NULL") db:exec(query) if not dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), query) then active_gquest_id = db:last_insert_rowid() end
-- Fetch gq info (rewards), then chain gq check (mob list) from gqinfo_end send_silent_gq_info(gq_num) end
function ldb_on_gq_mob_killed(name, line, wildcards) if not active_gquest_id then return end -- Enable per-mob QP capture for 1 second EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gq_mob_qp", true) DoAfterSpecial(1, 'EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gq_mob_qp", false)', 12) end
function ldb_on_gq_mob_qp(name, line, wildcards) if not active_gquest_id or not db then return end local amount = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not amount then return end db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET qp = COALESCE(qp, 0) + %d WHERE id = %d", amount, active_gquest_id)) end
function ldb_on_gq_won(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_gquest_id then return end
local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET result = 'won', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "gq_won")
-- Enable reward parsing for 1 second EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gq_reward", true) DoAfterSpecial(1, 'EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gq_reward", false); active_gquest_id = nil', 12) end
function ldb_on_gq_finished(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_gquest_id then return end
local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET result = 'completed', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "gq_finished")
-- Enable reward parsing for 1 second (may or may not fire) EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gq_reward", true) DoAfterSpecial(1, 'EnableTrigger("trg_ldb_gq_reward", false); active_gquest_id = nil', 12) end
function ldb_on_gq_ended(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_gquest_id then return end
-- Only act if gq_number matches our active gquest local gq_num = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if gq_num then local saved_gq_num = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT gq_number FROM gquests WHERE id = %d", active_gquest_id)) do saved_gq_num = row.gq_number end if saved_gq_num and saved_gq_num ~= gq_num then return end end
local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET result = 'expired', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "gq_ended") active_gquest_id = nil end
function ldb_on_gq_cancelled(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_gquest_id then return end
local gq_num = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if gq_num then local saved_gq_num = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT gq_number FROM gquests WHERE id = %d", active_gquest_id)) do saved_gq_num = row.gq_number end if saved_gq_num and saved_gq_num ~= gq_num then return end end
local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET result = 'cancelled', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "gq_cancelled") active_gquest_id = nil end
function ldb_on_gq_quit(name, line, wildcards) if not db then return end if not active_gquest_id then return end
local now = os.time() db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET result = 'quit', duration = %d - timestamp WHERE id = %d AND result IS NULL", now, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "gq_quit") active_gquest_id = nil end
function ldb_on_gq_not_in(name, line, wildcards) -- Only close if we think we're in a gquest if active_gquest_id then close_open_gquest() end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest: reward parsing handler -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_gq_reward(name, line, wildcards) if not active_gquest_id or not db then return end
local amount_str = wildcards[1] local rtype = wildcards[2] if not amount_str or not rtype then return end
local amount = tonumber((string.gsub(amount_str, ",", ""))) if not amount then return end
local field = nil if string.find(rtype, "quest point") then field = "qp" elseif string.find(rtype, "gold coin") then field = "gold" elseif string.find(rtype, "trivia point") then field = "tp" elseif string.find(rtype, "training session") then field = "trains" elseif string.find(rtype, "practice") then field = "pracs" end
if field then db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET %s = COALESCE(%s, 0) + %d WHERE id = %d", field, field, amount, active_gquest_id)) dbcheck(db:errcode(), db:errmsg(), "gq_reward " .. field) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest: silent gq info parsing handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_gqinfo_none(name, line, wildcards) disable_gqinfo_parsing() close_open_gquest() end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_multi(name, line, wildcards) -- "There is more than one global quest running." has a follow-up line -- "Use syntax: 'gquest info [num]'..." that needs to be gagged too. -- Delay disable by 1s so the gag trigger catches the follow-up line. DoAfterSpecial(1, "ldb_on_gqinfo_multi_cleanup()", 12) end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_multi_cleanup() disable_gqinfo_parsing() -- Don't close active gquest — "more than one" doesn't mean we're not in one. -- Fall back to gq check to get mob list if we have an active gquest. if active_gquest_id then enable_gqcheck_parsing() SendNoEcho("gq check") end end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_qn(name, line, wildcards) gqinfo_gq_number = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_status(name, line, wildcards) gqinfo_status = wildcards[1] end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_qp(name, line, wildcards) gqinfo_qp = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_gold(name, line, wildcards) local gold_str = wildcards[1] if gold_str then gqinfo_gold = tonumber((string.gsub(gold_str, ",", ""))) end end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_pracs(name, line, wildcards) gqinfo_pracs = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_trains(name, line, wildcards) gqinfo_trains = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_tp(name, line, wildcards) gqinfo_tp = tonumber(wildcards[1]) end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_gag(name, line, wildcards) -- No-op handler for gagged gq info lines end
function ldb_on_gqinfo_end(name, line, wildcards) -- Closing separator: end of gq info output disable_gqinfo_parsing()
-- Guard: if no gq info data was parsed, this is a stray separator (e.g., -- from campaign reward output). Ignore it. if not gqinfo_gq_number and not gqinfo_qp and not gqinfo_status then return end
-- If gquest is Finished, don't parse mob list if gqinfo_status == "Finished" then close_open_gquest() return end
if not db or not enabled then return end
-- Only update existing records — never create new ones here. -- The join trigger is the sole creator of GQ records. if not active_gquest_id then return end
if gqinfo_gq_number then -- Verify gq_number matches saved record (check before updating) local saved_gq_num = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT gq_number FROM gquests WHERE id = %d", active_gquest_id)) do saved_gq_num = row.gq_number end if saved_gq_num and saved_gq_num ~= gqinfo_gq_number then -- gq info returned a different GQ than ours — we're no longer in our GQ close_open_gquest() return end -- Update gq_number on existing record (in case it was NULL from join) db:exec(string.format( "UPDATE gquests SET gq_number = %d WHERE id = %d", gqinfo_gq_number, active_gquest_id)) end
-- Chain: send gq check to fetch mob list if active_gquest_id then enable_gqcheck_parsing() SendNoEcho("gq check") end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest: silent gq check parsing handlers -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on_gqcheck_mob(name, line, wildcards) local count = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 1 local mob_name = wildcards[2] local area = wildcards[3] if mob_name then mob_name = string.match(mob_name, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") -- trim end if area then area = string.match(area, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") end table.insert(gqinfo_mob_buffer, {name = mob_name, area = area, count = count}) -- Reset timeout: bump generation so old timer becomes stale, schedule new one gqcheck_generation = gqcheck_generation + 1 DoAfterSpecial(1, "gqcheck_timeout(" .. gqcheck_generation .. ")", 12) end
-- Format 2: "You still have to kill N * mob (area)" (after gquest starts) function ldb_on_gqcheck_mob2(name, line, wildcards) local count = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 1 local mob_name = wildcards[2] local area = wildcards[3] if mob_name then mob_name = string.match(mob_name, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") end if area then area = string.match(area, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") end table.insert(gqinfo_mob_buffer, {name = mob_name, area = area, count = count}) -- Reset timeout (same as format 1) gqcheck_generation = gqcheck_generation + 1 DoAfterSpecial(1, "gqcheck_timeout(" .. gqcheck_generation .. ")", 12) end
function ldb_on_gqcheck_none(name, line, wildcards) -- Don't disable parsing here — let the 1s timeout handle it so the gag -- trigger catches follow-up lines ("You may win...", "You can be rewarded..."). -- The timeout's flush_gqcheck_mob_buffer() is a no-op since gquest is closed. close_open_gquest() end
function ldb_on_gqcheck_gag(name, line, wildcards) -- No-op handler for gagged gq check lines end
-- Timer-based end detection for gq check (must be global for DoAfterSpecial) -- Generation parameter prevents stale timeouts from acting after timer reset function gqcheck_timeout(gen) if gen ~= gqcheck_generation then return end -- stale timeout, ignore disable_gqcheck_parsing() flush_gqcheck_mob_buffer() end
-- ============================================================================= -- Global Quest: delayed gq info check on plugin load (must be global) -- ============================================================================= function delayed_gq_info() if not db then return end if not enabled then return end -- Only reconcile if we have a saved active gquest from a previous session. -- The join trigger is the sole creator of GQ records; we never discover GQs -- from gq info alone (it shows details even when not joined). if not active_gquest_id then return end
-- Look up gq_number for targeted gq info (avoids "more than one" ambiguity) local gq_number = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT gq_number FROM gquests WHERE id = %d", active_gquest_id)) do gq_number = row.gq_number end
if gq_number then send_silent_gq_info(gq_number) else -- No gq_number saved — use gq check to verify we're still in a GQ enable_gqcheck_parsing() SendNoEcho("gq check") end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Tabular rendering palette + row helper (S&D-style alt rows + per-cell color) -- -- Colors can be overridden via SetVariable("ldb_palette_<key>", "#hex") and -- a reload, e.g. SetVariable("ldb_palette_alt_row_bg", "#000000") to disable -- the alt-row background entirely. -- ============================================================================= local function palette_get(key, default) local v = GetVariable("ldb_palette_" .. key) if v and v ~= "" then return v end return default end
local PALETTE = { header_fg = palette_get("header_fg", "#808080"), sep_fg = palette_get("sep_fg", "#808080"), alt_row_bg = palette_get("alt_row_bg", "#000040"), text_fg = palette_get("text_fg", "#E0E0E0"), id_fg = palette_get("id_fg", "#A0A0A0"), number_fg = palette_get("number_fg", "#C0C0C0"), mob_fg = palette_get("mob_fg", "#87CEEB"), completed = palette_get("completed", "#7CFC00"), failed = palette_get("failed", "#FF6060"), timeout = palette_get("timeout", "#FFAA40"), unknown = palette_get("unknown", "#FFC000"), active = palette_get("active", "#00FF00"), summary_fg = palette_get("summary_fg", "#D0D0D0"), }
-- Background for row index i (1-based). Alt rows on even indices. local function row_bg(i) if i % 2 == 0 then return PALETTE.alt_row_bg end return "" end
-- Emit a single line composed of cells: each cell is {text=, fg=, bg=}. -- Cells inherit `default_bg` unless they specify their own bg. -- Finishes the line with Note("") to flush a newline. local function emit_row(cells, default_bg) for _, c in ipairs(cells) do ColourTell(c.fg or PALETTE.text_fg, c.bg or default_bg or "", c.text or "") end Note("") end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: format number with commas -- ============================================================================= local function format_number(n) local formatted = tostring(n) while true do local k formatted, k = string.gsub(formatted, "^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)", "%1,%2") if k == 0 then break end end return formatted end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: format number abbreviated (1234 -> "1.2k", 1234567 -> "1.2M") -- ============================================================================= local function format_abbreviated(n) if not n or n == 0 then return "0" end local abs_n = math.abs(n) local sign = n < 0 and "-" or "" if abs_n >= 1000000 then return sign .. string.format("%.1fM", abs_n / 1000000) elseif abs_n >= 1000 then return sign .. string.format("%.1fk", abs_n / 1000) else return sign .. tostring(math.floor(abs_n)) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: format time in seconds to human-readable -- ============================================================================= local function format_time(seconds) if not seconds then return "N/A" end if seconds < 0 then return "N/A" end if seconds < 60 then return string.format("%.1fs", seconds) elseif seconds < 3600 then local m = math.floor(seconds / 60) local s = seconds - m * 60 return string.format("%dm %ds", m, s) else local h = math.floor(seconds / 3600) local m = math.floor((seconds - h * 3600) / 60) return string.format("%dh %dm", h, m) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: bracket label and SQL CASE expression for level brackets -- ============================================================================= local BRACKETS = { {label = "1-50", min = 1, max = 50}, {label = "51-100", min = 51, max = 100}, {label = "101-150", min = 101, max = 150}, {label = "151-200", min = 151, max = 200}, }
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: check DB is available for queries -- ============================================================================= local function require_db() if not db then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "No database open. Try reloading the plugin.") return false end return true end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: format tier label with redo (hides +0) -- ============================================================================= local function format_tier_label(tier, redo) if redo and redo > 0 then return string.format("T%d+%d", tier, redo) else return string.format("T%d", tier) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: SQL WHERE fragment for redo (handles NULL as 0) -- ============================================================================= local function redo_where(redo_value) return string.format("COALESCE(redo, 0) = %d", redo_value or 0) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: parse tier/remort/redo filter from command arguments -- Returns: {all=true} or {tier=N, remort=N} or {tier=N} or {remort=N} or {} -- Returns nil on invalid input (error already printed) -- ============================================================================= local function parse_args(str, opts) opts = opts or {} if not str or str == "" then return {} end local s = string.lower(string.match(str, "^%s*(.-)%s*$")) if s == "" then return {} end if s == "all" then return {all = true} end
local result = {}
-- Bare number: context-dependent (remort by default, tier if opts.bare_is_tier) local bare = string.match(s, "^(%d+)$") if bare then if opts.bare_is_tier then result.tier = tonumber(bare) result.redo = 0 else result.remort = tonumber(bare) end return result end
-- Parse T<n> with optional +<redo> local t, plus_redo = string.match(s, "t(%d+)%+(%d+)") if not t then t = string.match(s, "t(%d+)") end local r = string.match(s, "r(%d+)")
if not t and not r then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Invalid filter: " .. str) ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Use: all, T1 R5, T9+3, T9+3 R5, R4, or T1") return nil end
if t then result.tier = tonumber(t) result.redo = plus_redo and tonumber(plus_redo) or 0 end if r then result.remort = tonumber(r) end
return result end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb (status) -- ============================================================================= function ldb_status(name, line, wildcards) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Status")
local function detail(label, value, value_fg) ColourTell(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " " .. label) ColourTell(value_fg or PALETTE.text_fg, "", value) Note("") end
detail("Enabled: ", enabled and "ON" or "OFF", enabled and PALETTE.completed or PALETTE.failed) detail("Database: ", db_path or "(none)", PALETTE.id_fg)
if db then local kill_count = 0 local death_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM kills") do kill_count = row.cnt end for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deaths") do death_count = row.cnt end detail("Kills recorded: ", format_number(kill_count), PALETTE.number_fg) detail("Deaths recorded: ", format_number(death_count), death_count > 0 and PALETTE.failed or PALETTE.number_fg)
local quest_count = 0 local campaign_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM quests") do quest_count = row.cnt end for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaigns") do campaign_count = row.cnt end detail("Quests recorded: ", format_number(quest_count), PALETTE.number_fg) detail("Campaigns recorded:", format_number(campaign_count), PALETTE.number_fg)
local pup_event_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM pup_events") do pup_event_count = row.cnt end detail("Pup events: ", format_number(pup_event_count), PALETTE.number_fg)
local gquest_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM gquests") do gquest_count = row.cnt end detail("GQuests recorded: ", format_number(gquest_count), PALETTE.number_fg) end
if cached_level then detail("Current level: ", tostring(cached_level), PALETTE.completed) if cached_redos and cached_redos > 0 then detail("Current redo: ", tostring(cached_redos), PALETTE.number_fg) end if cached_level >= 200 and cached_pups then detail("Current powerup: ", tostring(cached_pups), PALETTE.completed) if cached_tnl and cached_perlevel then detail("TNL: ", cached_tnl .. " / " .. cached_perlevel, PALETTE.number_fg) end end end if cached_zone then detail("Current zone: ", cached_zone, PALETTE.text_fg) end if in_combat and fight_start then detail("In combat: ", fight_start.enemy .. " (round " .. round_count .. ", dmg " .. format_number(damage_total) .. ")", PALETTE.failed) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb help -- ============================================================================= function ldb_help(name, line, wildcards) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Commands:") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb - Show status") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb help - Show this help") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb on / off - Enable/disable data collection") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb level [N] [filter] - Kill breakdown for level N (default: current)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb this [filter] - Kill breakdown for current level") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb last [filter] - Kill breakdown for previous level") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb pup [filter|zone] - Powerup productivity stats") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb pup <id> - Per-kill detail for a specific powerup") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb pup list [N] - Last N powerup events (default 10)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb zone [name] - Stats for a zone (default: current)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb mob <name> - Stats for a mob (substring match)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb top mobs [N] - Top N mobs by kill count (default 10)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb top zones [N] - Top N zones by total XP (default 10)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb top xp [N] - Top N mobs by avg XP per kill (default 10)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb remort [R] [T<n>] - Bracket summary for a remort") ColourNote("cyan", "", " Default: current tier & remort") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb remort 4 = R4 current tier") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb remort T1 R4 = T1 R4") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb tier [T] - Compare remorts within a tier") ColourNote("cyan", "", " Default: current tier") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb tier 1 = T1") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb quest [filter] - Quest log (default: current tier & remort)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb cp [filter] - Campaign log (default: current tier & remort)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb cp show <id> - Detailed view of a specific campaign") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb gq [filter] - Global quest log (default: current tier & remort)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb gq show <id> - Detailed view of a specific global quest") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb deaths [N] - Last N deaths (default 10)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb daily [N] - Per-day activity & rewards (default 7 days)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb db - Database file info") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb reload - Reload the plugin in place") ColourNote("cyan", "", " ldb update [check|force]- Update from GitHub (check = no install, force = reinstall)") ColourNote("cyan", "", "") ColourNote("cyan", "", " Filters: default = current tier, redo & remort") ColourNote("cyan", "", " all - All tiers and remorts (separate sections)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " T1 R5 - Specific tier and remort") ColourNote("cyan", "", " T9+3 R5 - Specific tier+redo and remort") ColourNote("cyan", "", " T1 - All remorts within a tier (separate sections)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " R4 - Specific remort, current tier") end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb on / ldb off -- ============================================================================= function ldb_on(name, line, wildcards) enabled = true if not db then open_db() end ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Data collection enabled.") end
function ldb_off(name, line, wildcards) enabled = false ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Data collection disabled.") end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb level [N] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_level(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local arg = tonumber(wildcards[1]) local filter = parse_args(wildcards[2]) if not filter then return end
if not arg and cached_level and cached_level >= 200 then ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Use 'ldb pup' for powerup stats.") return end
local level = arg or cached_level if not level then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current level unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end show_level_stats(level, nil, filter) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb thislevel -- ============================================================================= function ldb_thislevel(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local filter = parse_args(wildcards[1]) if not filter then return end if not cached_level then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current level unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if cached_level >= 200 then ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Use 'ldb pup' for powerup stats.") return end show_level_stats(cached_level, nil, filter) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb lastlevel -- ============================================================================= function ldb_lastlevel(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local filter = parse_args(wildcards[1]) if not filter then return end if not cached_level then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current level unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if cached_level >= 200 then ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Use 'ldb pup' for powerup stats.") return end if cached_level <= 1 then ColourNote("yellow", "", PREFIX .. "No previous level.") return end show_level_stats(cached_level - 1, nil, filter) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb pup [filter|id|zone] -- =============================================================================
-- Helper: build pup WHERE clause from filter + tier/remort defaults local function pup_where(filter) local tier = filter.tier or cached_tier local redo = filter.redo if not filter.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end local remort = filter.remort or cached_remorts if filter.all then return "level >= 200", nil, nil, nil end if not tier or not remort then return nil end if filter.tier and not filter.remort then -- Tier only: all remorts within tier return string.format("level >= 200 AND tier = %d AND %s", tier, redo_where(redo)), tier, nil, redo end return string.format("level >= 200 AND tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)), tier, remort, redo end
-- Helper: render per-area pup productivity table local function render_pup_area_table(kill_where, avg_trains, xp_per_level) if not xp_per_level or xp_per_level <= 0 then xp_per_level = cached_perlevel or 1000 end
local area_query = string.format( "SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as kills, AVG(xp_gained) as avg_xp, " .. "AVG(combat_time) as avg_time " .. "FROM kills WHERE %s " .. "AND (mob_level IS NULL OR mob_level > 200) " .. "GROUP BY zone ORDER BY kills DESC", kill_where)
local areas = {} for row in db:nrows(area_query) do table.insert(areas, row) end
if #areas == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No pup kills recorded.") return end
local hdr = string.format(" %-16s %5s %5s %7s %7s %6s", "Area", "Kills", "AvgXP", "AvgTime", "Est/Pup", "Trn/Hr") local sep = string.format(" %-16s %5s %5s %7s %7s %6s", "----------------", "-----", "-----", "-------", "-------", "------") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
-- Determine which area has the best Trn/Hr (we'll color it as completed) local best_trn_hr = 0 for _, a in ipairs(areas) do if a.avg_xp and a.avg_xp > 0 and a.avg_time and a.avg_time > 0 and avg_trains then local est_time_per_pup = (xp_per_level / a.avg_xp) * a.avg_time if est_time_per_pup > 0 then local thr = math.floor(avg_trains / est_time_per_pup * 3600) if thr > best_trn_hr then best_trn_hr = thr end end end end
for i, a in ipairs(areas) do local avg_time_str = "N/A" local est_pup_str = "N/A" local trn_hr_str = "N/A" local trn_hr_val = nil
if a.avg_time and a.avg_time > 0 then avg_time_str = format_time(a.avg_time) end
if a.avg_xp and a.avg_xp > 0 and a.avg_time and a.avg_time > 0 then local est_time_per_pup = (xp_per_level / a.avg_xp) * a.avg_time est_pup_str = format_time(est_time_per_pup) if avg_trains and est_time_per_pup > 0 then trn_hr_val = math.floor(avg_trains / est_time_per_pup * 3600) trn_hr_str = tostring(trn_hr_val) end end
local zone_display = a.zone if #zone_display > 16 then zone_display = string.sub(zone_display, 1, 15) .. "+" end
local trn_hr_fg = (trn_hr_val and trn_hr_val == best_trn_hr and best_trn_hr > 0) and PALETTE.completed or PALETTE.number_fg local bg = row_bg(i)
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-16s", zone_display), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(a.kills)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(math.floor(a.avg_xp))), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", avg_time_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", est_pup_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", trn_hr_str), fg = trn_hr_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- Helper: query and render pup summary + area table for a given pup/kill WHERE clause -- Returns pup_count, avg_trains, avg_xp_per_level for further use local function render_pup_section(pup_where_clause, kill_where) local pup_count = 0 local total_trains = 0 local avg_trains = nil local avg_xp_per_level = nil
for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(trains_earned), 0) as trains, " .. "AVG(trains_earned) as avg_t, " .. "AVG(xp_per_level) as avg_xpl " .. "FROM pup_events WHERE %s", pup_where_clause)) do pup_count = row.cnt total_trains = row.trains avg_trains = row.avg_t avg_xp_per_level = row.avg_xpl end
-- Check for pup kills (may exist without pup_events for historical data) local pup_kills = 0 for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM kills WHERE %s " .. "AND (mob_level IS NULL OR mob_level > 200)", kill_where)) do pup_kills = row.cnt end
if pup_count == 0 and pup_kills == 0 then return pup_count, avg_trains, avg_xp_per_level end
Note("")
if pup_count > 0 then local avg_t_str = avg_trains and string.format("%.1f", avg_trains) or "N/A" ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Powerups: %d Trains: %d (%s/pup)", pup_count, total_trains, avg_t_str))
local total_combat_time = 0 for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(combat_time), 0) as t FROM kills WHERE %s " .. "AND combat_time IS NOT NULL AND (mob_level IS NULL OR mob_level > 200)", kill_where)) do total_combat_time = row.t end local avg_time_per_pup = pup_count > 0 and total_combat_time / pup_count or 0 ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Combat time: %s (%s/pup)", format_time(total_combat_time), format_time(avg_time_per_pup))) else ColourNote("yellow", "", " Pup kills: " .. pup_kills .. " (no pup events recorded; tracking started in v7.0)") end
if pup_kills > 0 then Note("") local xp_per_level = avg_xp_per_level or cached_perlevel or 1000 render_pup_area_table(kill_where, avg_trains, xp_per_level) end
return pup_count, avg_trains, avg_xp_per_level end
-- Helper: render a list of pup event rows local function render_pup_list(pup_where_clause, limit) local pups = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT id, timestamp, tier, remort, redo, pup_number, zone, trains_earned " .. "FROM (SELECT * FROM pup_events WHERE %s ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT %d) ORDER BY id ASC", pup_where_clause, limit)) do table.insert(pups, row) end
if #pups == 0 then return end
local hdr = string.format(" %5s %-16s %-7s %5s %-16s %6s", "ID", "When", "T/R", "Pup#", "Zone", "Trains") local sep = string.format(" %5s %-16s %-7s %5s %-16s %6s", "-----", "----------------", "-------", "-----", "----------------", "------") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
for i, p in ipairs(pups) do local tr_label = format_tier_label(p.tier, p.redo) .. "R" .. p.remort local zone_display = p.zone or "?" if #zone_display > 16 then zone_display = string.sub(zone_display, 1, 15) .. "+" end local trains_str = p.trains_earned and tostring(p.trains_earned) or "N/A" local when_str = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M", p.timestamp) local bg = row_bg(i)
