emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", tostring(p.id)), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-16s", when_str), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", tr_label), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", tostring(p.pup_number)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-16s", zone_display), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", trains_str), fg = PALETTE.completed}, }, bg) end end
-- Show pup overview for a filter (summary + per-area table) local function show_pup_overview(filter) local kill_where, tier, remort, redo = pup_where(filter) if not kill_where then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier/remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end
-- Build label local label if filter.all then label = "all" elseif tier and not remort then label = format_tier_label(tier, redo) else label = format_tier_label(tier or 0, redo) .. " R" .. (remort or 0) end
-- Build pup_events WHERE clause matching the kill_where scope local pup_where_clause if filter.all then pup_where_clause = "1=1" elseif tier and not remort then pup_where_clause = string.format("tier = %d AND %s", tier, redo_where(redo)) else pup_where_clause = string.format("tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier or 0, remort or 0, redo_where(redo)) end
ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Powerup Summary (" .. label .. "):") render_pup_section(pup_where_clause, kill_where)
-- Last 5 pup events Note("") ColourNote("cyan", "", " Recent powerups:") render_pup_list(pup_where_clause, 5) end
-- Show per-kill detail for a specific pup event by ID local function show_pup_detail(pup_id) -- Look up this pup event local pup_event = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT * FROM pup_events WHERE id = %d", pup_id)) do pup_event = row end
if not pup_event then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "No pup event found with ID " .. pup_id .. ".") return end
local pup_redo = pup_event.redo or 0
-- Find previous pup event for same tier+remort+redo to get time bounds local prev_timestamp = 0 for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT MAX(timestamp) as ts FROM pup_events " .. "WHERE tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s AND id < %d", pup_event.tier, pup_event.remort, redo_where(pup_redo), pup_id)) do if row.ts then prev_timestamp = row.ts end end
-- Query kills between prev pup and this pup local kills_query = string.format( "SELECT mob_name, zone, xp_gained, damage_total, rounds, mob_level, combat_time " .. "FROM kills WHERE level >= 200 AND tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s " .. "AND timestamp > %d AND timestamp <= %d " .. "AND (mob_level IS NULL OR mob_level > 200) " .. "ORDER BY timestamp", pup_event.tier, pup_event.remort, redo_where(pup_redo), prev_timestamp, pup_event.timestamp)
local kills = {} for row in db:nrows(kills_query) do table.insert(kills, row) end
-- Header local label = format_tier_label(pup_event.tier, pup_redo) .. string.format(" R%d, pup %d", pup_event.remort, pup_event.pup_number) local zone_str = pup_event.zone and (" - " .. pup_event.zone) or "" ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format("%sPowerup #%d (%s)%s:", PREFIX, pup_id, label, zone_str))
if #kills == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills found for this powerup.") else -- Calculate column widths local max_mob = 3 local max_zone = 4 for _, k in ipairs(kills) do if #k.mob_name > max_mob then max_mob = #k.mob_name end if #k.zone > max_zone then max_zone = #k.zone end end if max_mob > 24 then max_mob = 24 end if max_zone > 16 then max_zone = 16 end
local num_w = #tostring(#kills) if num_w < 1 then num_w = 1 end
local function trunc(s, w) if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
local hdr = string.format( " %-" .. num_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %7s %5s %3s %4s %5s", "#", "Mob", "Zone", "XP", "Dmg", "Rnd", "MLvl", "Time") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) local sep = " " .. string.rep("-", num_w) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_mob) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_zone) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 7) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 5) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 3) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 4) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 5) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
local total_xp = 0 local total_damage = 0 local total_rounds = 0 local total_time = 0 local time_count = 0
for i, k in ipairs(kills) do total_xp = total_xp + k.xp_gained total_damage = total_damage + k.damage_total total_rounds = total_rounds + k.rounds if k.combat_time then total_time = total_time + k.combat_time time_count = time_count + 1 end
local mlvl_str = k.mob_level and tostring(k.mob_level) or "-" local time_str = k.combat_time and format_time(k.combat_time) or "N/A" local bg = row_bg(i)
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. num_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(k.mob_name, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_zone .. "s", trunc(k.zone, max_zone)), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", format_number(k.xp_gained)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_number(k.damage_total)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%3d", k.rounds), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%4s", mlvl_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", time_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end
ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
local footer_label_w = num_w + 2 + max_mob local time_total_str = time_count > 0 and format_time(total_time) or "N/A" ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " %-" .. footer_label_w .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %7s %5s %3d %4s %5s", string.format("Tot %d kills", #kills), "", format_number(total_xp), format_number(total_damage), total_rounds, "", time_total_str))
local avg_xp = math.floor(total_xp / #kills) local avg_dmg = math.floor(total_damage / #kills) local avg_rnd = string.format("%.1f", total_rounds / #kills) local avg_time_str = time_count > 0 and format_time(total_time / time_count) or "N/A" ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " %-" .. footer_label_w .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %7s %5s %3s %4s %5s", "Avg", "", format_number(avg_xp), format_number(avg_dmg), avg_rnd, "", avg_time_str)) end
-- Reward summary if pup_event.trains_earned then ColourNote(PALETTE.completed, "", " Trains earned: " .. pup_event.trains_earned) end if pup_event.xp_per_level then ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " XP needed: " .. format_number(pup_event.xp_per_level)) end end
-- Show per-mob detail for a zone during pup leveling local function show_pup_zone_detail(zone_search) local tier = cached_tier local redo = cached_redos or 0 local remort = cached_remorts if not tier or not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier/remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end
local zone_pattern = "%" .. zone_search .. "%" local query = string.format( "SELECT mob_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(xp_gained) as avg_xp, " .. "AVG(combat_time) as avg_time, AVG(rounds) as avg_rnd " .. "FROM kills WHERE level >= 200 AND tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s " .. "AND zone LIKE %s " .. "AND (mob_level IS NULL OR mob_level > 200) " .. "GROUP BY mob_name ORDER BY cnt DESC", tier, remort, redo_where(redo), fixsql(zone_pattern))
local mobs = {} for row in db:nrows(query) do table.insert(mobs, row) end
-- Find actual zone name from first kill local actual_zone = zone_search for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT zone FROM kills WHERE level >= 200 AND tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s " .. "AND zone LIKE %s LIMIT 1", tier, remort, redo_where(redo), fixsql(zone_pattern))) do actual_zone = row.zone end
local label = format_tier_label(tier, redo) .. " R" .. remort ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format("%sPup zone detail: %s (%s):", PREFIX, actual_zone, label))
if #mobs == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No pup kills found in this zone.") return end
local hdr = string.format(" %-24s %5s %5s %7s %5s", "Mob", "Kills", "AvgXP", "AvgTime", "AvgRd") local sep = string.format(" %-24s %5s %5s %7s %5s", "------------------------", "-----", "-----", "-------", "-----") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
for i, m in ipairs(mobs) do local mob_display = m.mob_name if #mob_display > 24 then mob_display = string.sub(mob_display, 1, 23) .. "+" end local avg_time_str = m.avg_time and format_time(m.avg_time) or "N/A" local bg = row_bg(i)
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-24s", mob_display), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5d", m.cnt), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(math.floor(m.avg_xp))), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", avg_time_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", m.avg_rnd and string.format("%.1f", m.avg_rnd) or "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- Main ldb pup command handler function ldb_pup(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local arg = wildcards[1]
-- No argument: show overview for current T+R if not arg or arg == "" then show_pup_overview({}) return end
local s = string.match(arg, "^%s*(.-)%s*$") -- trim local sl = string.lower(s)
-- "list" or "list N": show recent pup events local list_n = string.match(sl, "^list%s*(%d*)$") if list_n ~= nil then local n = tonumber(list_n) or 10 local tier = cached_tier local redo = cached_redos or 0 local remort = cached_remorts if not tier or not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier/remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end local pup_where_clause = string.format("tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)) ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format("%sLast %d powerups (%s R%d):", PREFIX, n, format_tier_label(tier, redo), remort)) render_pup_list(pup_where_clause, n) return end
-- Numeric: show pup detail by ID local num = tonumber(s) if num then show_pup_detail(num) return end
-- Try to parse as filter (all, T1, R3, T1R3, etc.) if sl == "all" or string.match(sl, "^[tr]%d") then local filter = parse_args(arg) if filter then show_pup_overview(filter) end return end
-- Otherwise treat as zone substring show_pup_zone_detail(s) end
function show_level_stats_section(level, tier, remort, redo, label) -- Build WHERE clause local where = string.format("level = %d", level) if tier then where = where .. string.format(" AND tier = %d", tier) end if remort then where = where .. string.format(" AND remort = %d", remort) end if redo then where = where .. " AND " .. redo_where(redo) end
-- Header ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Level " .. level .. " kills " .. label .. ":")
-- Fetch kills local kills_query = "SELECT mob_name, zone, xp_gained, damage_total, rounds, mob_level " .. "FROM kills WHERE " .. where .. " ORDER BY timestamp" local kills = {} for row in db:nrows(kills_query) do table.insert(kills, row) end
-- Death count (deaths table has no pup column, filter by level + tier/remort/redo) local deaths_where = string.format("level = %d", level) if tier then deaths_where = deaths_where .. string.format(" AND tier = %d", tier) end if remort then deaths_where = deaths_where .. string.format(" AND remort = %d", remort) end if redo then deaths_where = deaths_where .. " AND " .. redo_where(redo) end local total_deaths = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deaths WHERE " .. deaths_where) do total_deaths = row.cnt end
local no_kills_msg = " No kills recorded at this level." if #kills == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", no_kills_msg) if total_deaths > 0 then ColourNote("red", "", " Deaths: " .. total_deaths) end return end
-- Calculate column widths from data local max_mob = 3 -- "Mob" local max_zone = 4 -- "Zone" for _, k in ipairs(kills) do if #k.mob_name > max_mob then max_mob = #k.mob_name end if #k.zone > max_zone then max_zone = #k.zone end end if max_mob > 24 then max_mob = 24 end if max_zone > 20 then max_zone = 20 end
local num_w = #tostring(#kills) if num_w < 1 then num_w = 1 end
local function trunc(s, w) if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
-- Column header local hdr = string.format(" %-" .. num_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %7s %5s %3s %4s", "#", "Mob", "Zone", "XP", "Dmg", "Rnd", "MLvl") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) local sep = " " .. string.rep("-", num_w) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_mob) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_zone) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 7) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 5) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 3) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 4) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
-- Data rows local total_xp = 0 local total_damage = 0 local total_rounds = 0
for i, k in ipairs(kills) do total_xp = total_xp + k.xp_gained total_damage = total_damage + k.damage_total total_rounds = total_rounds + k.rounds
local mlvl_str = k.mob_level and tostring(k.mob_level) or "-" local bg = row_bg(i)
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. num_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(k.mob_name, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_zone .. "s", trunc(k.zone, max_zone)), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", format_number(k.xp_gained)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_number(k.damage_total)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%3d", k.rounds), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%4s", mlvl_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end
-- Footer ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
local footer_label_w = num_w + 2 + max_mob
local tot_str = string.format(" %-" .. footer_label_w .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %7s %5s %3d %4s", string.format("Tot %d kills", #kills), "", format_number(total_xp), format_number(total_damage), total_rounds, "") ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", tot_str)
local avg_xp = math.floor(total_xp / #kills) local avg_dmg = math.floor(total_damage / #kills) local avg_rnd = string.format("%.1f", total_rounds / #kills) local avg_str = string.format(" %-" .. footer_label_w .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %7s %5s %3s %4s", "Avg", "", format_number(avg_xp), format_number(avg_dmg), avg_rnd, "") ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", avg_str)
if total_deaths > 0 then ColourNote(PALETTE.failed, "", " Deaths: " .. total_deaths) end end
function show_level_stats(level, _, filter) filter = filter or {}
-- Determine if this is a multi-section or single-section query local multi_section = filter.all or (filter.tier and not filter.remort)
if multi_section then -- Build WHERE for combo discovery (exclude NULLs) local where = string.format("level = %d AND tier IS NOT NULL AND remort IS NOT NULL", level) if filter.tier then where = where .. string.format(" AND tier = %d", filter.tier) local redo = filter.redo or 0 where = where .. " AND " .. redo_where(redo) end
local combos = {} for row in db:nrows("SELECT DISTINCT tier, remort, COALESCE(redo, 0) as redo FROM kills WHERE " .. where .. " ORDER BY tier, COALESCE(redo, 0), remort") do table.insert(combos, {tier = row.tier, remort = row.remort, redo = row.redo}) end
if #combos == 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Level " .. level .. " kills:") ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills recorded at this level.") return end
for i, combo in ipairs(combos) do if i > 1 then Note("") end local label = "(" .. format_tier_label(combo.tier, combo.redo) .. " R" .. combo.remort .. ")" show_level_stats_section(level, combo.tier, combo.remort, combo.redo, label) end else -- Single section: resolve tier and remort local tier = filter.tier or cached_tier local redo = filter.redo if not filter.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end local remort = filter.remort or cached_remorts
if not tier then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end
local label = "(" .. format_tier_label(tier, redo) .. " R" .. remort .. ")" show_level_stats_section(level, tier, remort, redo, label) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: query bracket stats for a given tier + remort -- Returns table of bracket results, total kills, total deaths -- ============================================================================= local function query_bracket_stats(tier, remort, redo) local results = {} local grand_kills = 0 local grand_deaths = 0
for _, br in ipairs(BRACKETS) do local where_k = string.format( "tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s AND level >= %d AND level <= %d", tier, remort, redo_where(redo), br.min, br.max) local where_d = string.format( "tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s AND level >= %d AND level <= %d", tier, remort, redo_where(redo), br.min, br.max)
local row_data = { label = br.label, kills = 0, avg_xp = 0, avg_dmg = 0, avg_gap = nil, avg_rnd = 0, zones = 0, deaths = 0, }
for row in db:nrows( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, " .. "COALESCE(AVG(xp_gained), 0) as avg_xp, " .. "COALESCE(AVG(damage_total), 0) as avg_dmg, " .. "AVG(CASE WHEN mob_level IS NOT NULL THEN mob_level - level ELSE NULL END) as avg_gap, " .. "COALESCE(AVG(rounds), 0) as avg_rnd, " .. "COUNT(DISTINCT zone) as zones " .. "FROM kills WHERE " .. where_k) do row_data.kills = row.cnt row_data.avg_xp = row.avg_xp row_data.avg_dmg = row.avg_dmg row_data.avg_gap = row.avg_gap row_data.avg_rnd = row.avg_rnd row_data.zones = row.zones end
for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deaths WHERE " .. where_d) do row_data.deaths = row.cnt end
grand_kills = grand_kills + row_data.kills grand_deaths = grand_deaths + row_data.deaths table.insert(results, row_data) end
return results, grand_kills, grand_deaths end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: render bracket table (used by both ldb remort and ldb tier) -- ============================================================================= local function render_bracket_table(rows, show_header, grand_zones) local fmt = " %-7s %5s %5s %6s %6s %6s %5s %6s" if show_header then ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", string.format(fmt, "Bracket", "Kills", "AvgXP", "AvgDmg", "AvgGap", "AvgRnd", "Zones", "Deaths")) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", string.format(fmt, "-------", "-----", "-----", "------", "------", "------", "-----", "------")) end
local grand_kills = 0 local grand_xp_sum = 0 local grand_dmg_sum = 0 local grand_gap_sum = 0 local grand_gap_count = 0 local grand_rnd_sum = 0 local grand_deaths = 0
for i, r in ipairs(rows) do grand_kills = grand_kills + r.kills grand_deaths = grand_deaths + r.deaths local bg = row_bg(i) local death_str = r.deaths > 0 and tostring(r.deaths) or "-" local death_fg = r.deaths > 0 and PALETTE.failed or PALETTE.number_fg
if r.kills == 0 then emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", r.label), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", death_str), fg = death_fg}, }, bg) else grand_xp_sum = grand_xp_sum + (r.avg_xp * r.kills) grand_dmg_sum = grand_dmg_sum + (r.avg_dmg * r.kills) grand_rnd_sum = grand_rnd_sum + (r.avg_rnd * r.kills) if r.avg_gap then grand_gap_sum = grand_gap_sum + (r.avg_gap * r.kills) grand_gap_count = grand_gap_count + r.kills end
local gap_str = "-" if r.avg_gap then gap_str = string.format("%+.1f", r.avg_gap) end
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", r.label), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(r.kills)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(math.floor(r.avg_xp))), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", format_abbreviated(math.floor(r.avg_dmg))), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", gap_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", string.format("%.1f", r.avg_rnd)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", r.zones), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", death_str), fg = death_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- Total row separator ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", string.format(fmt, "-------", "-----", "-----", "------", "------", "------", "-----", "------"))
local tot_avg_xp = grand_kills > 0 and format_abbreviated(math.floor(grand_xp_sum / grand_kills)) or "-" local tot_avg_dmg = grand_kills > 0 and format_abbreviated(math.floor(grand_dmg_sum / grand_kills)) or "-" local tot_avg_gap = grand_gap_count > 0 and string.format("%+.1f", grand_gap_sum / grand_gap_count) or "-" local tot_avg_rnd = grand_kills > 0 and string.format("%.1f", grand_rnd_sum / grand_kills) or "-"
local zones_str = grand_zones and tostring(grand_zones) or "" local tot_death_fg = grand_deaths > 0 and PALETTE.failed or PALETTE.summary_fg
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", "Total"), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(grand_kills)), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", tot_avg_xp), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", tot_avg_dmg), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", tot_avg_gap), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", tot_avg_rnd), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", zones_str), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", grand_deaths > 0 and tostring(grand_deaths) or "-"), fg = tot_death_fg}, }, "") end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb remort [R] [T<n>] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_remort(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local args = parse_args(wildcards[1]) if not args then return end
local tier = args.tier or cached_tier local redo = args.redo if not args.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end local remort = args.remort or cached_remorts
if not tier then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end
local results, grand_kills, grand_deaths = query_bracket_stats(tier, remort, redo)
-- Total distinct zones across all brackets (a zone can span multiple brackets) local grand_zones = 0 for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT zone) as cnt FROM kills WHERE tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s " .. "AND level >= 1 AND level <= 200", tier, remort, redo_where(redo))) do grand_zones = row.cnt end
-- Header local death_str = grand_deaths > 0 and (", " .. grand_deaths .. " deaths") or "" ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format( "%sRemort summary - %s R%d (%s kills%s):", PREFIX, format_tier_label(tier, redo), remort, format_number(grand_kills), death_str))
if grand_kills == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills recorded for this remort.") return end
render_bracket_table(results, true, grand_zones)
-- Pup section local pup_where_clause = string.format("tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)) local kill_where = string.format("level >= 200 AND tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)) -- render_pup_section prints nothing if no pup data exists render_pup_section(pup_where_clause, kill_where) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb tier [T] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_tier(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local args = parse_args(wildcards[1], {bare_is_tier = true}) if not args then return end
local tier = args.tier or cached_tier local redo = args.redo if not args.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end
if not tier then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end
-- Find all remorts for this tier+redo local remorts = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT DISTINCT remort FROM kills WHERE tier = %d AND %s AND remort IS NOT NULL " .. "ORDER BY remort", tier, redo_where(redo))) do table.insert(remorts, row.remort) end
if #remorts == 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format("%sTier summary - %s:", PREFIX, format_tier_label(tier, redo))) ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills recorded for this tier.") return end
-- Count totals for header local tier_kills = 0 local tier_deaths = 0 for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM kills WHERE tier = %d AND %s AND remort IS NOT NULL", tier, redo_where(redo))) do tier_kills = row.cnt end for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deaths WHERE tier = %d AND %s AND remort IS NOT NULL", tier, redo_where(redo))) do tier_deaths = row.cnt end
local death_str = tier_deaths > 0 and (", " .. tier_deaths .. " deaths") or "" ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format( "%sTier summary - %s (%d remorts, %s kills%s):", PREFIX, format_tier_label(tier, redo), #remorts, format_number(tier_kills), death_str))
-- Query bracket stats for all remorts up front (reuse query_bracket_stats) local all_remort_data = {} for _, rm in ipairs(remorts) do all_remort_data[rm] = query_bracket_stats(tier, rm, redo) end
-- For each bracket, show a section with one row per remort local tier_fmt = " %-7s %5s %5s %6s %6s %6s %5s %6s" for bi, br in ipairs(BRACKETS) do if bi > 1 then Note("") end
-- Collect the bi-th bracket row from each remort's results local bracket_has_data = false local bracket_rows = {} for _, rm in ipairs(remorts) do local r = all_remort_data[rm][bi] local row_data = { label = "R" .. rm, kills = r.kills, avg_xp = r.avg_xp, avg_dmg = r.avg_dmg, avg_gap = r.avg_gap, avg_rnd = r.avg_rnd, zones = r.zones, deaths = r.deaths, } if row_data.kills > 0 or row_data.deaths > 0 then bracket_has_data = true end table.insert(bracket_rows, row_data) end
ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", " -- " .. br.label .. " --") if not bracket_has_data then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No data.") else ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", string.format(tier_fmt, "Remort", "Kills", "AvgXP", "AvgDmg", "AvgGap", "AvgRnd", "Zones", "Deaths")) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", string.format(tier_fmt, "-------", "-----", "-----", "------", "------", "------", "-----", "------"))
for ri, r in ipairs(bracket_rows) do local bg = row_bg(ri) local death_str = r.deaths > 0 and tostring(r.deaths) or "-" local death_fg = r.deaths > 0 and PALETTE.failed or PALETTE.number_fg
if r.kills == 0 then emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", r.label), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", death_str), fg = death_fg}, }, bg) else local gap_str = "-" if r.avg_gap then gap_str = string.format("%+.1f", r.avg_gap) end
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", r.label), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(r.kills)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", format_abbreviated(math.floor(r.avg_xp))), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", format_abbreviated(math.floor(r.avg_dmg))), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", gap_str), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", string.format("%.1f", r.avg_rnd)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5s", r.zones), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", death_str), fg = death_fg}, }, bg) end end end end
-- Powerups comparison section local pup_fmt = " %-7s %4s %6s %7s %7s %6s" local pup_has_data = false local pup_rows = {} for _, rm in ipairs(remorts) do local pup_row = {label = "R" .. rm, pups = 0, trains = 0, trn_pup = nil, avg_time = nil, trn_hr = nil}
for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(trains_earned), 0) as trains, " .. "AVG(trains_earned) as avg_t " .. "FROM pup_events WHERE tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, rm, redo_where(redo))) do pup_row.pups = row.cnt pup_row.trains = row.trains pup_row.trn_pup = row.avg_t end
if pup_row.pups > 0 then pup_has_data = true -- Get avg combat time per pup local total_combat_time = 0 for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(combat_time), 0) as t FROM kills WHERE level >= 200 " .. "AND tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s AND combat_time IS NOT NULL " .. "AND (mob_level IS NULL OR mob_level > 200)", tier, rm, redo_where(redo))) do total_combat_time = row.t end pup_row.avg_time = total_combat_time / pup_row.pups if pup_row.trn_pup and pup_row.avg_time > 0 then pup_row.trn_hr = math.floor(pup_row.trn_pup / pup_row.avg_time * 3600) end end
table.insert(pup_rows, pup_row) end
if pup_has_data then Note("") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", " -- Powerups --") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", string.format(pup_fmt, "Remort", "Pups", "Trains", "Trn/Pup", "AvgTime", "Trn/Hr")) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", string.format(pup_fmt, "------", "----", "------", "-------", "-------", "------"))
-- Find best Trn/Hr to highlight local best_trn_hr = 0 for _, r in ipairs(pup_rows) do if r.trn_hr and r.trn_hr > best_trn_hr then best_trn_hr = r.trn_hr end end
for ri, r in ipairs(pup_rows) do local bg = row_bg(ri) if r.pups == 0 then emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", r.label), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%4s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", "-"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) else local trn_hr_fg = (r.trn_hr and r.trn_hr == best_trn_hr and best_trn_hr > 0) and PALETTE.completed or PALETTE.number_fg emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-7s", r.label), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%4s", tostring(r.pups)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", tostring(r.trains)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", r.trn_pup and string.format("%.1f", r.trn_pup) or "N/A"), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%7s", format_time(r.avg_time)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", r.trn_hr and tostring(r.trn_hr) or "N/A"), fg = trn_hr_fg}, }, bg) end end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Helper: format duration as seconds or minutes -- ============================================================================= local function format_duration(secs) if not secs then return "-" end if secs < 120 then return secs .. "s" else return math.floor(secs / 60) .. "m" end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb quest / ldb quests [filter] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_quests(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local filter = parse_args(wildcards[1]) if not filter then return end
-- Resolve tier/remort/redo local tier = filter.tier or cached_tier local redo = filter.redo if not filter.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end local remort = filter.remort or cached_remorts
if not filter.all then if not tier then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end end
-- Build WHERE clause local where = "1=1" if not filter.all then where = string.format("tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)) elseif filter.tier then where = string.format("tier = %d AND %s", filter.tier, redo_where(filter.redo or 0)) end
-- Fetch quests in chronological order local quests = {} for row in db:nrows( "SELECT id, timestamp, level, mob_name, area, result, qp, gold, tp, duration " .. "FROM quests WHERE " .. where .. " ORDER BY timestamp") do table.insert(quests, row) end
-- Check if there are more local total_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM quests WHERE " .. where) do total_count = row.cnt end
-- Header local label = filter.all and "all" or (format_tier_label(tier, redo) .. " R" .. remort) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Quests - " .. label .. ":")
if #quests == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No quests recorded.") return end
-- Determine max mob+area width local max_mob = 10 -- minimum for _, q in ipairs(quests) do local mob_area = (q.mob_name or "?") .. " (" .. (q.area or "?") .. ")" if #mob_area > max_mob then max_mob = #mob_area end end if max_mob > 35 then max_mob = 35 end
local function trunc(s, w) if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
-- Column widths (header & data formatted via per-column %-Xs / %Xs) local max_id = 2 for _, q in ipairs(quests) do local id_len = #tostring(q.id) if id_len > max_id then max_id = id_len end end local id_w, lvl_w, qp_w, gold_w, tp_w, time_w = max_id, 3, 6, 7, 3, 5
local hdr_text = string.format( " %-" .. id_w .. "s %" .. lvl_w .. "s %" .. qp_w .. "s %" .. gold_w .. "s %" .. tp_w .. "s %" .. time_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %s", "#", "Lvl", "QP", "Gold", "TP", "Time", "Mob (Area)", "Result") local sep = string.format( " %-" .. id_w .. "s %" .. lvl_w .. "s %" .. qp_w .. "s %" .. gold_w .. "s %" .. tp_w .. "s %" .. time_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %s", string.rep("-", id_w), string.rep("-", lvl_w), string.rep("-", qp_w), string.rep("-", gold_w), string.rep("-", tp_w), string.rep("-", time_w), string.rep("-", max_mob), "------")
ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr_text) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
-- Data rows local comp_count = 0 local fail_count = 0 local timeout_count = 0 local unknown_count = 0 local sum_qp = 0 local sum_gold = 0 local sum_duration = 0
-- Per-result color local function result_color(result, is_active) if is_active then return PALETTE.active end if result == "completed" then return PALETTE.completed end if result == "failed" then return PALETTE.failed end if result == "timeout" then return PALETTE.timeout end if result == "unknown" then return PALETTE.unknown end return PALETTE.text_fg end
for i, q in ipairs(quests) do local is_active = (q.id == active_quest_id and (q.result == nil or q.result == "")) local is_completed = (q.result == "completed")
if q.result == "completed" then comp_count = comp_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (q.qp or 0) sum_gold = sum_gold + (q.gold or 0) sum_duration = sum_duration + (q.duration or 0) elseif q.result == "failed" then fail_count = fail_count + 1 elseif q.result == "timeout" then timeout_count = timeout_count + 1 elseif q.result == "unknown" then unknown_count = unknown_count + 1 end
local mob_area = (q.mob_name or "?") .. " (" .. (q.area or "?") .. ")" local rcolor = result_color(q.result, is_active) local label_str = is_active and "active" or (q.result or "?") local bg = row_bg(i)
-- Numeric cells dim when uncompleted (data is meaningful only on success) local num_fg = is_completed and PALETTE.number_fg or "#707070"
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. id_w .. "s", q.id), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. lvl_w .. "s", q.level), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. qp_w .. "s", q.qp and format_number(q.qp) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. gold_w .. "s", q.gold and format_number(q.gold) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. tp_w .. "s", q.tp and tostring(q.tp) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. time_w .. "s", format_duration(q.duration)), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(mob_area, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = label_str, fg = rcolor}, }, bg) end
-- Summary ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep) local parts = {} if comp_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, comp_count .. " completed") end if fail_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, fail_count .. " failed") end if timeout_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, timeout_count .. " timeout") end if unknown_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, unknown_count .. " unknown") end local summary_line = " " .. table.concat(parts, ", ") if total_count > #quests then summary_line = summary_line .. string.format(" (showing %d of %d)", #quests, total_count) else summary_line = summary_line .. string.format(" (of %d total)", #quests) end ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", summary_line)
if comp_count > 0 then local avg_qp = math.floor(sum_qp / comp_count) local avg_dur = math.floor(sum_duration / comp_count) ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Avg QP: %s | Avg time: %s | Total QP: %s | Total gold: %s", format_number(avg_qp), format_duration(avg_dur), format_number(sum_qp), format_number(sum_gold))) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb cp / ldb cps / ldb campaign / ldb campaigns [filter] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_campaigns(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local filter = parse_args(wildcards[1]) if not filter then return end
-- Resolve tier/remort/redo local tier = filter.tier or cached_tier local redo = filter.redo if not filter.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end local remort = filter.remort or cached_remorts
if not filter.all then if not tier then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end end
-- Build WHERE clause local where = "1=1" if not filter.all then where = string.format("tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)) elseif filter.tier then where = string.format("tier = %d AND %s", filter.tier, redo_where(filter.redo or 0)) end
-- Fetch campaigns in chronological order local campaigns = {} for row in db:nrows( "SELECT id, timestamp, level, result, mob_count, qp, gold, tp, duration " .. "FROM campaigns WHERE " .. where .. " ORDER BY timestamp") do table.insert(campaigns, row) end
-- Check if there are more local total_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaigns WHERE " .. where) do total_count = row.cnt end
-- Header local label = filter.all and "all" or (format_tier_label(tier, redo) .. " R" .. remort) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Campaigns - " .. label .. ":")
if #campaigns == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No campaigns recorded.") return end
-- Column widths local max_id = 2 for _, c in ipairs(campaigns) do local id_len = #tostring(c.id) if id_len > max_id then max_id = id_len end end local id_w, lvl_w, mob_w, qp_w, gold_w, tp_w, time_w = max_id, 3, 4, 6, 7, 3, 5
local hdr_text = string.format( " %-" .. id_w .. "s %" .. lvl_w .. "s %" .. mob_w .. "s %" .. qp_w .. "s %" .. gold_w .. "s %" .. tp_w .. "s %" .. time_w .. "s %s", "#", "Lvl", "Mobs", "QP", "Gold", "TP", "Time", "Result") local sep = string.format( " %-" .. id_w .. "s %" .. lvl_w .. "s %" .. mob_w .. "s %" .. qp_w .. "s %" .. gold_w .. "s %" .. tp_w .. "s %" .. time_w .. "s %s", string.rep("-", id_w), string.rep("-", lvl_w), string.rep("-", mob_w), string.rep("-", qp_w), string.rep("-", gold_w), string.rep("-", tp_w), string.rep("-", time_w), "------")
ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr_text) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
-- Data rows local comp_count = 0 local quit_count = 0 local unknown_count = 0 local sum_qp = 0 local sum_gold = 0 local sum_duration = 0
local function result_color(result, is_active) if is_active then return PALETTE.active end if result == "completed" then return PALETTE.completed end if result == "quit" then return PALETTE.failed end if result == "unknown" then return PALETTE.unknown end return PALETTE.text_fg end
for i, c in ipairs(campaigns) do local is_active = (c.id == active_campaign_id and (c.result == nil or c.result == "")) local is_completed = (c.result == "completed")
if c.result == "completed" then comp_count = comp_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (c.qp or 0) sum_gold = sum_gold + (c.gold or 0) sum_duration = sum_duration + (c.duration or 0) elseif c.result == "quit" then quit_count = quit_count + 1 elseif c.result == "unknown" then unknown_count = unknown_count + 1 end
local rcolor = result_color(c.result, is_active) local label_str = is_active and "active" or (c.result or "?") local bg = row_bg(i) local num_fg = is_completed and PALETTE.number_fg or "#707070"
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. id_w .. "s", c.id), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. lvl_w .. "s", c.level), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. mob_w .. "s", c.mob_count and tostring(c.mob_count) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. qp_w .. "s", c.qp and format_number(c.qp) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. gold_w .. "s", c.gold and format_number(c.gold) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. tp_w .. "s", c.tp and tostring(c.tp) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. time_w .. "s", format_duration(c.duration)), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = label_str, fg = rcolor}, }, bg) end
-- Summary ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep) local parts = {} if comp_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, comp_count .. " completed") end if quit_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, quit_count .. " quit") end if unknown_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, unknown_count .. " unknown") end local summary_line = " " .. table.concat(parts, ", ") if total_count > #campaigns then summary_line = summary_line .. string.format(" (showing %d of %d)", #campaigns, total_count) else summary_line = summary_line .. string.format(" (of %d total)", #campaigns) end ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", summary_line)
if comp_count > 0 then local avg_qp = math.floor(sum_qp / comp_count) local avg_dur = math.floor(sum_duration / comp_count) ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Avg QP: %s | Avg time: %s | Total QP: %s | Total gold: %s", format_number(avg_qp), format_duration(avg_dur), format_number(sum_qp), format_number(sum_gold))) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb cp show <id> -- ============================================================================= function ldb_campaign_show(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local cp_id = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not cp_id then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Usage: ldb cp show <id>") return end
-- Fetch campaign record local campaign = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT id, timestamp, level, tier, remort, redo, result, duration, mob_count, " .. "qp, gold, tp, trains, pracs, expected_qp, expected_gold " .. "FROM campaigns WHERE id = %d", cp_id)) do campaign = row end
if not campaign then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Campaign #" .. cp_id .. " not found.") return end
-- Header ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Campaign #" .. cp_id .. ":")
local function detail(label, value, value_fg) ColourTell(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " " .. label) ColourTell(value_fg or PALETTE.text_fg, "", value) Note("") end
detail("Started: ", os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M", campaign.timestamp), PALETTE.id_fg)
-- Level + tier/remort local level_str = tostring(campaign.level) if campaign.tier and campaign.remort then level_str = level_str .. " (" .. format_tier_label(campaign.tier, campaign.redo) .. " R" .. campaign.remort .. ")" end detail("Level: ", level_str)
-- Result + duration local is_active = (campaign.id == active_campaign_id and (campaign.result == nil or campaign.result == "")) local result = campaign.result or "active" local dur_str = campaign.duration and (" (" .. format_duration(campaign.duration) .. ")") or ""
local result_fg, result_text if is_active or result == "active" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.active, "active" elseif result == "completed" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.completed, "completed" .. dur_str elseif result == "quit" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.failed, "quit" .. dur_str elseif result == "unknown" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.unknown, "unknown" .. dur_str else result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.text_fg, result .. dur_str end detail("Result: ", result_text, result_fg)
-- Mobs if campaign.mob_count then detail("Mobs: ", tostring(campaign.mob_count), PALETTE.number_fg) end
-- Rewards if result == "completed" then local reward_parts = {} if campaign.qp then table.insert(reward_parts, format_number(campaign.qp) .. " QP") end if campaign.gold then table.insert(reward_parts, format_number(campaign.gold) .. " gold") end if campaign.tp then table.insert(reward_parts, campaign.tp .. " TP") end if campaign.trains then table.insert(reward_parts, campaign.trains .. " trains") end if campaign.pracs then table.insert(reward_parts, campaign.pracs .. " pracs") end if #reward_parts > 0 then detail("Rewards: ", table.concat(reward_parts, ", "), PALETTE.completed) end elseif is_active or result == "active" then local exp_parts = {} if campaign.expected_qp then table.insert(exp_parts, format_number(campaign.expected_qp) .. " QP") end if campaign.expected_gold then table.insert(exp_parts, format_number(campaign.expected_gold) .. " gold") end if #exp_parts > 0 then detail("Expected: ", table.concat(exp_parts, ", "), PALETTE.summary_fg) end end
-- Mob list local mobs = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT mob_name, area FROM campaign_mobs WHERE campaign_id = %d ORDER BY id", cp_id)) do table.insert(mobs, row) end
if #mobs > 0 then Note("") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", " Mob list (" .. #mobs .. "):") local num_w = #tostring(#mobs) local max_mob = 3 for _, mob in ipairs(mobs) do if #mob.mob_name > max_mob then max_mob = #mob.mob_name end end if max_mob > 32 then max_mob = 32 end
for i, mob in ipairs(mobs) do local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. num_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = ". ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", mob.mob_name), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " (", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = mob.area or "?", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = ")", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, }, bg) end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb gq / ldb gquests [filter] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_gquests(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local filter = parse_args(wildcards[1]) if not filter then return end
-- Resolve tier/remort/redo local tier = filter.tier or cached_tier local redo = filter.redo if not filter.tier then redo = cached_redos or 0 end if redo == nil then redo = 0 end local remort = filter.remort or cached_remorts
if not filter.all then if not tier then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current tier unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end if not remort then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current remort unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end end
-- Build WHERE clause local where = "1=1" if not filter.all then where = string.format("tier = %d AND remort = %d AND %s", tier, remort, redo_where(redo)) elseif filter.tier then where = string.format("tier = %d AND %s", filter.tier, redo_where(filter.redo or 0)) end
-- Fetch gquests in chronological order local gquests = {} for row in db:nrows( "SELECT id, timestamp, level, gq_number, result, mob_count, qp, gold, tp, duration " .. "FROM gquests WHERE " .. where .. " ORDER BY timestamp") do table.insert(gquests, row) end
-- Check if there are more local total_count = 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM gquests WHERE " .. where) do total_count = row.cnt end
-- Header local label = filter.all and "all" or (format_tier_label(tier, redo) .. " R" .. remort) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Global Quests - " .. label .. ":")
if #gquests == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No global quests recorded.") return end
-- Column widths local max_id = 2 for _, g in ipairs(gquests) do local id_len = #tostring(g.id) if id_len > max_id then max_id = id_len end end local id_w, lvl_w, mob_w, qp_w, gold_w, tp_w, time_w = max_id, 3, 4, 6, 7, 3, 5
local hdr_text = string.format( " %-" .. id_w .. "s %" .. lvl_w .. "s %" .. mob_w .. "s %" .. qp_w .. "s %" .. gold_w .. "s %" .. tp_w .. "s %" .. time_w .. "s %s", "#", "Lvl", "Mobs", "QP", "Gold", "TP", "Time", "Result") local sep = string.format( " %-" .. id_w .. "s %" .. lvl_w .. "s %" .. mob_w .. "s %" .. qp_w .. "s %" .. gold_w .. "s %" .. tp_w .. "s %" .. time_w .. "s %s", string.rep("-", id_w), string.rep("-", lvl_w), string.rep("-", mob_w), string.rep("-", qp_w), string.rep("-", gold_w), string.rep("-", tp_w), string.rep("-", time_w), "---------")
ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr_text) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
-- Data rows local won_count = 0 local comp_count = 0 local expired_count = 0 local cancelled_count = 0 local quit_count = 0 local unknown_count = 0 local sum_qp = 0 local sum_gold = 0 local sum_duration = 0 local finished_count = 0 -- won + completed (for avg calculations)
local function result_color(result, is_active) if is_active then return PALETTE.active end if result == "won" then return PALETTE.completed end if result == "completed" then return PALETTE.completed end if result == "expired" then return PALETTE.failed end if result == "cancelled" then return PALETTE.failed end if result == "quit" then return PALETTE.failed end if result == "unknown" then return PALETTE.unknown end return PALETTE.text_fg end
for i, g in ipairs(gquests) do local is_active = (g.id == active_gquest_id and (g.result == nil or g.result == ""))
if g.result == "won" then won_count = won_count + 1 finished_count = finished_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (g.qp or 0) sum_gold = sum_gold + (g.gold or 0) sum_duration = sum_duration + (g.duration or 0) elseif g.result == "completed" then comp_count = comp_count + 1 finished_count = finished_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (g.qp or 0) sum_gold = sum_gold + (g.gold or 0) sum_duration = sum_duration + (g.duration or 0) elseif g.result == "expired" then expired_count = expired_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (g.qp or 0) -- per-mob QP still counts elseif g.result == "cancelled" then cancelled_count = cancelled_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (g.qp or 0) elseif g.result == "quit" then quit_count = quit_count + 1 sum_qp = sum_qp + (g.qp or 0) elseif g.result == "unknown" then unknown_count = unknown_count + 1 end
local rcolor = result_color(g.result, is_active) local label_str = is_active and "active" or (g.result or "?") local bg = row_bg(i) local is_finished = (g.result == "won" or g.result == "completed") local num_fg = is_finished and PALETTE.number_fg or "#707070"
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. id_w .. "s", g.id), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. lvl_w .. "s", g.level), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. mob_w .. "s", g.mob_count and tostring(g.mob_count) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. qp_w .. "s", g.qp and format_number(g.qp) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. gold_w .. "s", g.gold and format_number(g.gold) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. tp_w .. "s", g.tp and tostring(g.tp) or "-"), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. time_w .. "s", format_duration(g.duration)), fg = num_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = label_str, fg = rcolor}, }, bg) end
-- Summary ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep) local parts = {} if won_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, won_count .. " won") end if comp_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, comp_count .. " completed") end if expired_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, expired_count .. " expired") end if cancelled_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, cancelled_count .. " cancelled") end if quit_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, quit_count .. " quit") end if unknown_count > 0 then table.insert(parts, unknown_count .. " unknown") end local summary_line = " " .. table.concat(parts, ", ") if total_count > #gquests then summary_line = summary_line .. string.format(" (showing %d of %d)", #gquests, total_count) else summary_line = summary_line .. string.format(" (of %d total)", #gquests) end ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", summary_line)
if sum_qp > 0 then local avg_parts = {} if finished_count > 0 then table.insert(avg_parts, "Avg QP: " .. format_number(math.floor(sum_qp / finished_count))) table.insert(avg_parts, "Avg time: " .. format_duration(math.floor(sum_duration / finished_count))) end table.insert(avg_parts, "Total QP: " .. format_number(sum_qp)) if sum_gold > 0 then table.insert(avg_parts, "Total gold: " .. format_number(sum_gold)) end ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " " .. table.concat(avg_parts, " | ")) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb gq show <id> -- ============================================================================= function ldb_gquest_show(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end
local gq_id = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not gq_id then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Usage: ldb gq show <id>") return end
-- Fetch gquest record local gquest = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT id, timestamp, gq_number, level, tier, remort, redo, result, duration, mob_count, " .. "qp, gold, tp, trains, pracs, expected_qp, expected_gold " .. "FROM gquests WHERE id = %d", gq_id)) do gquest = row end
if not gquest then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Global Quest #" .. gq_id .. " not found.") return end
-- Header local header = PREFIX .. "Global Quest #" .. gq_id if gquest.gq_number then header = header .. " (GQ " .. gquest.gq_number .. ")" end ColourNote("cyan", "", header .. ":")
local function detail(label, value, value_fg) ColourTell(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " " .. label) ColourTell(value_fg or PALETTE.text_fg, "", value) Note("") end
detail("Started: ", os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M", gquest.timestamp), PALETTE.id_fg)
local level_str = tostring(gquest.level) if gquest.tier and gquest.remort then level_str = level_str .. " (" .. format_tier_label(gquest.tier, gquest.redo) .. " R" .. gquest.remort .. ")" end detail("Level: ", level_str)
local is_active = (gquest.id == active_gquest_id and (gquest.result == nil or gquest.result == "")) local result = gquest.result or "active" local dur_str = gquest.duration and (" (" .. format_duration(gquest.duration) .. ")") or ""
local result_fg, result_text if is_active or result == "active" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.active, "active" elseif result == "won" or result == "completed" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.completed, result .. dur_str elseif result == "expired" or result == "cancelled" or result == "quit" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.failed, result .. dur_str elseif result == "unknown" then result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.unknown, "unknown" .. dur_str else result_fg, result_text = PALETTE.text_fg, result .. dur_str end detail("Result: ", result_text, result_fg)
if gquest.mob_count then detail("Mobs: ", tostring(gquest.mob_count), PALETTE.number_fg) end
-- Rewards if result == "won" or result == "completed" then local reward_parts = {} if gquest.qp then table.insert(reward_parts, format_number(gquest.qp) .. " QP") end if gquest.gold then table.insert(reward_parts, format_number(gquest.gold) .. " gold") end if gquest.tp then table.insert(reward_parts, gquest.tp .. " TP") end if gquest.trains then table.insert(reward_parts, gquest.trains .. " trains") end if gquest.pracs then table.insert(reward_parts, gquest.pracs .. " pracs") end if #reward_parts > 0 then detail("Rewards: ", table.concat(reward_parts, ", "), PALETTE.completed) end elseif is_active or result == "active" then local exp_parts = {} if gquest.expected_qp then table.insert(exp_parts, format_number(gquest.expected_qp) .. " QP (base)") end if gquest.expected_gold then table.insert(exp_parts, format_number(gquest.expected_gold) .. " gold") end if #exp_parts > 0 then detail("Expected: ", table.concat(exp_parts, ", "), PALETTE.summary_fg) end if gquest.qp and gquest.qp > 0 then detail("Mob QP: ", format_number(gquest.qp) .. " (so far)", PALETTE.number_fg) end elseif result == "expired" or result == "cancelled" or result == "quit" then if gquest.qp and gquest.qp > 0 then detail("Mob QP: ", format_number(gquest.qp), PALETTE.number_fg) end end
-- Mob list local mobs = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT mob_name, area, mob_count FROM gquest_mobs WHERE gquest_id = %d ORDER BY id", gq_id)) do table.insert(mobs, row) end
if #mobs > 0 then Note("") ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", " Mob list (" .. #mobs .. "):") local num_w = #tostring(#mobs) local max_mob = 3 for _, mob in ipairs(mobs) do local mob_str = mob.mob_name if mob.mob_count and mob.mob_count > 1 then mob_str = mob.mob_count .. " * " .. mob_str end if #mob_str > max_mob then max_mob = #mob_str end end if max_mob > 32 then max_mob = 32 end
for i, mob in ipairs(mobs) do local mob_str = mob.mob_name if mob.mob_count and mob.mob_count > 1 then mob_str = mob.mob_count .. " * " .. mob_str end local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%" .. num_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = ". ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", mob_str), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " (", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = mob.area or "?", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = ")", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, }, bg) end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb zone [name] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_zone(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local zone_name = wildcards[1] if not zone_name or zone_name == "" then zone_name = cached_zone if not zone_name then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Current zone unknown. Try again after GMCP data arrives.") return end end show_zone_stats(zone_name) end
function show_zone_stats(zone_name) local like_pattern = "%" .. zone_name .. "%"
local zones_found = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM kills WHERE zone LIKE %s", fixsql(like_pattern))) do table.insert(zones_found, row.zone) end
if #zones_found == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", PREFIX .. "No kills recorded in zones matching '" .. zone_name .. "'.") return end
for zi, zone in ipairs(zones_found) do if zi > 1 then Note("") end ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Zone: " .. zone)
local stats = nil for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(xp_gained), 0) as xp " .. "FROM kills WHERE zone = %s ", fixsql(zone))) do stats = row end
if stats and stats.cnt > 0 then local avg_xp = math.floor(stats.xp / stats.cnt) ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Kills: %s | XP: %s | Avg XP/kill: %s", format_number(stats.cnt), format_number(stats.xp), format_number(avg_xp))) end
-- Deaths in this zone for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deaths WHERE zone = %s", fixsql(zone))) do if row.cnt > 0 then ColourNote(PALETTE.failed, "", " Deaths: " .. row.cnt) end end
-- Level range for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT MIN(level) as min_lvl, MAX(level) as max_lvl " .. "FROM kills WHERE zone = %s ", fixsql(zone))) do if row.min_lvl then ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Level range: %d - %d", row.min_lvl, row.max_lvl)) end end
-- Top mobs (table) local mobs = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT mob_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(xp_gained) as xp " .. "FROM kills WHERE zone = %s " .. "GROUP BY mob_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5", fixsql(zone))) do table.insert(mobs, row) end
if #mobs > 0 then local rank_w = #tostring(#mobs) local max_mob = 3 for _, m in ipairs(mobs) do if #m.mob_name > max_mob then max_mob = #m.mob_name end end if max_mob > 32 then max_mob = 32 end local function trunc(s, w) if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", string.format( " Top mobs: %-" .. rank_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %5s %9s", "#", "Mob", "Kills", "XP")) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", " " .. string.rep("-", rank_w) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_mob) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 5) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 9)) for i, m in ipairs(mobs) do local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. rank_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(m.mob_name, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5d", m.cnt), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%9s", format_number(m.xp)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb mob <name> -- ============================================================================= function ldb_mob(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local mob_search = wildcards[1] local like_pattern = "%" .. mob_search .. "%"
ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Mob search: " .. mob_search)
local rows = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT mob_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(xp_gained), 0) as xp, " .. "COALESCE(SUM(damage_total), 0) as dmg, " .. "COALESCE(SUM(rounds), 0) as rnd " .. "FROM kills WHERE mob_name LIKE %s " .. "GROUP BY mob_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10", fixsql(like_pattern))) do table.insert(rows, row) end
if #rows == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills found matching '" .. mob_search .. "'.") return end
for ri, row in ipairs(rows) do if ri > 1 then Note("") end ColourNote(PALETTE.mob_fg, "", " " .. row.mob_name)
local avg_xp = math.floor(row.xp / row.cnt) local avg_rnd = row.cnt > 0 and string.format("%.1f", row.rnd / row.cnt) or "0" ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", string.format( " Kills: %s | XP: %s | Avg XP: %s | Avg rounds: %s", format_number(row.cnt), format_number(row.xp), format_number(avg_xp), avg_rnd))
-- Zones where this mob was killed local zones = {} for zrow in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM kills WHERE mob_name = %s ", fixsql(row.mob_name))) do table.insert(zones, zrow.zone) end if #zones > 0 then ColourNote(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " Zones: " .. table.concat(zones, ", ")) end end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb top mobs [N] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_top_mobs(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local limit = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 10
ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Top " .. limit .. " mobs by kill count:")
local rows = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT mob_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(xp_gained), 0) as xp " .. "FROM kills " .. "GROUP BY mob_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT %d", limit)) do table.insert(rows, row) end
if #rows == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills recorded.") return end
local rank_w = #tostring(#rows) local max_mob = 3 for _, r in ipairs(rows) do if #r.mob_name > max_mob then max_mob = #r.mob_name end end if max_mob > 32 then max_mob = 32 end
local function trunc(s, w) if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
local hdr = string.format(" %-" .. rank_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %6s %9s", "#", "Mob", "Kills", "XP") local sep = " " .. string.rep("-", rank_w) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_mob) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 6) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 9) ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
for i, r in ipairs(rows) do local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. rank_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(r.mob_name, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", format_number(r.cnt)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%9s", format_number(r.xp)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb top zones [N] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_top_zones(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local limit = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 10
ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Top " .. limit .. " zones by total XP:")
local rows = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(xp_gained), 0) as xp " .. "FROM kills " .. "GROUP BY zone ORDER BY xp DESC LIMIT %d", limit)) do table.insert(rows, row) end
if #rows == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No kills recorded.") return end
local rank_w = #tostring(#rows) local max_zone = 4 for _, r in ipairs(rows) do if r.zone and #r.zone > max_zone then max_zone = #r.zone end end if max_zone > 32 then max_zone = 32 end
local function trunc(s, w) if not s then return "" end if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
local hdr = string.format(" %-" .. rank_w .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %6s %9s", "#", "Zone", "Kills", "XP") local sep = " " .. string.rep("-", rank_w) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_zone) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 6) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 9) ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
for i, r in ipairs(rows) do local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. rank_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_zone .. "s", trunc(r.zone or "?", max_zone)), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%6s", format_number(r.cnt)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%9s", format_number(r.xp)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb top xp [N] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_top_xp(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local limit = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 10
ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Top " .. limit .. " mobs by avg XP per kill:")
local rows = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT mob_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(xp_gained) as xp, " .. "CAST(SUM(xp_gained) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) as avg_xp " .. "FROM kills " .. "GROUP BY mob_name HAVING cnt >= 3 " .. "ORDER BY avg_xp DESC LIMIT %d", limit)) do table.insert(rows, row) end
if #rows == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No mobs with 3+ kills recorded.") return end
local rank_w = #tostring(#rows) local max_mob = 3 for _, r in ipairs(rows) do if #r.mob_name > max_mob then max_mob = #r.mob_name end end if max_mob > 32 then max_mob = 32 end
local function trunc(s, w) if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
local hdr = string.format(" %-" .. rank_w .. "s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %8s %5s", "#", "Mob", "Avg XP", "Kills") local sep = " " .. string.rep("-", rank_w) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_mob) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 8) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 5) ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
for i, r in ipairs(rows) do local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. rank_w .. "d", i), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(r.mob_name, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.mob_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%8s", format_number(math.floor(r.avg_xp))), fg = PALETTE.completed}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%5d", r.cnt), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb deaths [N] -- ============================================================================= function ldb_deaths(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local limit = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 10
ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Last " .. limit .. " deaths:")
-- Fetch all rows first so we can size columns local rows = {} for row in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT timestamp, mob_name, zone, level, tier, remort, redo FROM deaths " .. "ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT %d", limit)) do table.insert(rows, row) end
if #rows == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No deaths recorded.") return end
local max_mob = 5 -- "Mob" local max_zone = 4 -- "Zone" for _, r in ipairs(rows) do local mob = (r.mob_name and r.mob_name ~= "") and r.mob_name or "unknown" if #mob > max_mob then max_mob = #mob end if r.zone and #r.zone > max_zone then max_zone = #r.zone end end if max_mob > 28 then max_mob = 28 end if max_zone > 22 then max_zone = 22 end
local function trunc(s, w) if not s then return "" end if #s > w then return string.sub(s, 1, w - 1) .. "+" else return s end end
local hdr = string.format(" %-16s %3s %-" .. max_mob .. "s %-" .. max_zone .. "s %s", "When", "Lvl", "Mob", "Zone", "Bracket") local sep = " " .. string.rep("-", 16) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 3) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_mob) .. " " .. string.rep("-", max_zone) .. " " .. string.rep("-", 7) ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
for i, r in ipairs(rows) do local time_str = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M", r.timestamp) local mob = (r.mob_name and r.mob_name ~= "") and r.mob_name or "unknown" local tr = "" if r.tier and r.remort then tr = format_tier_label(r.tier, r.redo) .. " R" .. r.remort end local bg = row_bg(i)
emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-16s", time_str), fg = PALETTE.id_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%3d", r.level), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_mob .. "s", trunc(mob, max_mob)), fg = PALETTE.failed}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-" .. max_zone .. "s", trunc(r.zone or "?", max_zone)), fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = tr, fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb db -- ============================================================================= function ldb_db_info(name, line, wildcards) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Database info:")
local function detail(label, value, value_fg) ColourTell(PALETTE.summary_fg, "", " " .. label) ColourTell(value_fg or PALETTE.text_fg, "", value) Note("") end
detail("Path: ", db_path or "(none)", PALETTE.id_fg)
if not db then ColourNote("yellow", "", " Database not open.") return end
-- File size local f = io.open(db_path, "r") if f then local size = f:seek("end") f:close() local size_str if size < 1024 then size_str = size .. " bytes" elseif size < 1024 * 1024 then size_str = string.format("%.1f KB", size / 1024) else size_str = string.format("%.1f MB", size / (1024 * 1024)) end detail("Size: ", size_str, PALETTE.number_fg) end
-- Per-table counts as a small alt-row table local tables = { {name = "Kills", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM kills"}, {name = "Deaths", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deaths"}, {name = "Quests", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM quests"}, {name = "Campaigns", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaigns"}, {name = "GQuests", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM gquests"}, {name = "Pup events", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM pup_events"}, {name = "Level events", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM level_events"}, {name = "Events", sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM events"}, } for i, t in ipairs(tables) do local cnt = 0 for row in db:nrows(t.sql) do cnt = row.cnt end local bg = row_bg(i) emit_row({ {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = string.format("%-13s", t.name .. ":"), fg = PALETTE.summary_fg}, {text = string.format("%9s", format_number(cnt)), fg = PALETTE.number_fg}, }, bg) end end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb daily [N] (default 7 days) -- =============================================================================
-- SQL date expression: 'YYYY-MM-DD' in local time from a unix-epoch column local function day_expr(col) return string.format("date(%s,'unixepoch','localtime')", col) end
-- Enumerate the last N days (most recent first) -- Lua list of 'YYYY-MM-DD' local function enumerate_days(n) local days = {} local now_t = os.date('*t', os.time()) for i = 0, n - 1 do local tt = {year = now_t.year, month = now_t.month, day = now_t.day - i, hour = 12} table.insert(days, os.date('%Y-%m-%d', os.time(tt))) end return days end
-- Run a query, return map of day -> row local function query_by_day(sql) local out = {} for row in db:nrows(sql) do out[row.day] = row end return out end
-- Render value as '-' for nil/zero local function ndash(n) if not n or n == 0 then return "-" end return format_number(n) end
-- Compact abbrev: 1.2M / 234K / 567 local function compact(n) if not n or n == 0 then return "-" end local abs_n = math.abs(n) local sign = n < 0 and "-" or "" if abs_n >= 1000000 then return sign .. string.format("%.1fM", abs_n / 1000000) elseif abs_n >= 1000 then return sign .. string.format("%.0fK", abs_n / 1000) end return sign .. tostring(math.floor(abs_n)) end
-- "X/Y" with '-' if total is 0 local function ratio2(num, total) if (total or 0) == 0 then return "-" end return string.format("%d/%d", num or 0, total or 0) end
-- Render a daily table (counts or rewards). Date column is always shown; data -- columns whose `nonzero(day)` returns false for every day in the window are -- hidden entirely (header, separator, and per-row cell all disappear). -- -- Each column: {header, width, align="left|right" (default "right"), -- nonzero=fn(d)->bool, format=fn(d)->string, fg=fn(d,is_today)->color} local function render_daily_table(title, days, columns) local today = os.date('%Y-%m-%d') ColourNote("cyan", "", title)
-- Filter out columns that are empty across the entire window local visible = {} for _, col in ipairs(columns) do local has_data = false for _, d in ipairs(days) do if col.nonzero(d) then has_data = true; break end end if has_data then table.insert(visible, col) end end
if #visible == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " (No data in this window.)") return end
local DATE_W = 11
local function pad(text, width, align) local fmt = "%" .. (align == "left" and "-" or "") .. width .. "s" return string.format(fmt, text) end
-- Header + separator local hdr = " " .. pad("Date", DATE_W, "left") local sep = " " .. pad(string.rep("-", DATE_W), DATE_W, "left") for _, col in ipairs(visible) do hdr = hdr .. " " .. pad(col.header, col.width, col.align) sep = sep .. " " .. pad(string.rep("-", col.width), col.width, col.align) end ColourNote(PALETTE.header_fg, "", hdr) ColourNote(PALETTE.sep_fg, "", sep)
-- Render oldest -> newest (today at bottom). Bg alternates by row index. local row_idx = 0 for i = #days, 1, -1 do row_idx = row_idx + 1 local d = days[i] local is_today = (d == today) local date_label = is_today and (d .. "*") or (d .. " ") local date_fg = is_today and PALETTE.active or PALETTE.text_fg local bg = row_bg(row_idx)
