local cells = { {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}, {text = pad(date_label, DATE_W, "left"), fg = date_fg}, } for _, col in ipairs(visible) do table.insert(cells, {text = " ", fg = PALETTE.text_fg}) table.insert(cells, { text = pad(col.format(d), col.width, col.align), fg = col.fg(d, is_today), }) end emit_row(cells, bg) end end
local function render_daily_counts(days) local n = #days local where = string.format( "WHERE %s >= date('now','-%d days','localtime')", day_expr("timestamp"), n - 1)
local kills = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM kills " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local deaths = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM deaths " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local lvls = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM level_events " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local pups = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM pup_events " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local quests = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS total, " .. "SUM(CASE WHEN result='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comp " .. "FROM quests " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local cps = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS total, " .. "SUM(CASE WHEN result='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comp " .. "FROM campaigns " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local gqs = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COUNT(*) AS total, " .. "SUM(CASE WHEN result='won' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS won, " .. "SUM(CASE WHEN result='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comp " .. "FROM gquests " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local gold_q = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(gold),0) AS amt FROM quests " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local gold_cp = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(gold),0) AS amt FROM campaigns " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local gold_gq = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(gold),0) AS amt FROM gquests " .. where .. " AND result IN ('won','completed') GROUP BY day") local gold_misc = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amt FROM events " .. where .. " AND category='gold' GROUP BY day")
local today = os.date('%Y-%m-%d') local title = string.format("%sDaily activity (last %d days, ending %s):", PREFIX, n, today)
local function getn(t, d, key) return ((t[d] or {})[key]) or 0 end local function gold_total(d) return getn(gold_q, d, "amt") + getn(gold_cp, d, "amt") + getn(gold_gq, d, "amt") + getn(gold_misc, d, "amt") end
local columns = { {header = "Kills", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(kills, d, "cnt") > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(kills, d, "cnt")) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "Deaths", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(deaths, d, "cnt") > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(deaths, d, "cnt")) end, fg = function(d) return getn(deaths, d, "cnt") > 0 and PALETTE.failed or PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "Lvl", width = 4, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(lvls, d, "cnt") > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(lvls, d, "cnt")) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.completed end}, {header = "Pup", width = 4, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(pups, d, "cnt") > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(pups, d, "cnt")) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.completed end}, {header = "Quests", width = 7, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(quests, d, "total") > 0 end, format = function(d) return ratio2(getn(quests, d, "comp"), getn(quests, d, "total")) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "CPs", width = 7, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(cps, d, "total") > 0 end, format = function(d) return ratio2(getn(cps, d, "comp"), getn(cps, d, "total")) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "GQs", width = 9, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(gqs, d, "total") > 0 end, format = function(d) local gq = gqs[d] or {} if (gq.total or 0) == 0 then return "-" end return string.format("%d/%d/%d", gq.won or 0, gq.comp or 0, gq.total or 0) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "Gold", width = 8, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return gold_total(d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return compact(gold_total(d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, }
render_daily_table(title, days, columns) end
local function render_daily_rewards(days) local n = #days local where = string.format( "WHERE %s >= date('now','-%d days','localtime')", day_expr("timestamp"), n - 1)
local xp = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(xp_gained),0) AS amt FROM kills " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local qp_q = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(qp),0) AS amt FROM quests " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local qp_cp = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(qp),0) AS amt FROM campaigns " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local qp_gq = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(qp),0) AS amt FROM gquests " .. where .. " AND result IN ('won','completed') GROUP BY day") local qp_other = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amt FROM events " .. where .. " AND category='qp' GROUP BY day") local tp_q = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(tp),0) AS amt FROM quests " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local tp_cp = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(tp),0) AS amt FROM campaigns " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local tp_gq = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(tp),0) AS amt FROM gquests " .. where .. " AND result IN ('won','completed') GROUP BY day") local tp_other = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amt FROM events " .. where .. " AND category='tp' GROUP BY day") local tr_lvl = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(trains_gained),0) AS amt FROM level_events " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local tr_pup = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(trains_earned),0) AS amt FROM pup_events " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local tr_q = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(trains),0) AS amt FROM quests " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local tr_cp = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(trains),0) AS amt FROM campaigns " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local tr_gq = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(trains),0) AS amt FROM gquests " .. where .. " AND result IN ('won','completed') GROUP BY day") local tr_other = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amt FROM events " .. where .. " AND category='train' AND source != 'instinct_deposit' GROUP BY day") local pr_lvl = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(pracs_gained),0) AS amt FROM level_events " .. where .. " GROUP BY day") local pr_q = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(pracs),0) AS amt FROM quests " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local pr_cp = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(pracs),0) AS amt FROM campaigns " .. where .. " AND result='completed' GROUP BY day") local pr_other = query_by_day( "SELECT " .. day_expr("timestamp") .. " AS day, COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amt FROM events " .. where .. " AND category='prac' GROUP BY day")
local title = string.format("%sDaily rewards (last %d days):", PREFIX, n)
local function getn(t, d) return ((t[d] or {}).amt) or 0 end local function qp_total(d) return getn(qp_q, d) + getn(qp_cp, d) + getn(qp_gq, d) + getn(qp_other, d) end local function tp_total(d) return getn(tp_q, d) + getn(tp_cp, d) + getn(tp_gq, d) + getn(tp_other, d) end local function tr_total(d) return getn(tr_lvl, d) + getn(tr_pup, d) + getn(tr_q, d) + getn(tr_cp, d) + getn(tr_gq, d) + getn(tr_other, d) end local function pr_total(d) return getn(pr_lvl, d) + getn(pr_q, d) + getn(pr_cp, d) + getn(pr_other, d) end
local columns = { {header = "XP", width = 6, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(xp, d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return compact(getn(xp, d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "QP", width = 6, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return qp_total(d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(qp_total(d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.completed end}, {header = "Q", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(qp_q, d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(qp_q, d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "CP", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(qp_cp, d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(qp_cp, d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "GQ", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(qp_gq, d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(qp_gq, d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "oth", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return getn(qp_other, d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(getn(qp_other, d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "TP", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return tp_total(d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(tp_total(d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "Trains", width = 6, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return tr_total(d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(tr_total(d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, {header = "Pracs", width = 5, align = "right", nonzero = function(d) return pr_total(d) > 0 end, format = function(d) return ndash(pr_total(d)) end, fg = function() return PALETTE.number_fg end}, }
render_daily_table(title, days, columns) end
function ldb_daily(name, line, wildcards) if not require_db() then return end local n = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 7 if n < 1 then n = 1 end if n > 365 then n = 365 end local days = enumerate_days(n) render_daily_counts(days) Note("") render_daily_rewards(days) end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb reload — reload the plugin in place -- ============================================================================= local function trigger_reload() if GetAlphaOption("script_prefix") == "" then SetAlphaOption("script_prefix", "\\\\\\") end Execute(GetAlphaOption("script_prefix") .. 'DoAfterSpecial(1, "ReloadPlugin(\'' .. GetPluginID() .. '\')", sendto.script)') end
function ldb_reload(name, line, wildcards) ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Reloading plugin...") trigger_reload() end
-- ============================================================================= -- Command: ldb update [check|force] -- ldb update - check GitHub; install only if upstream is NEWER -- ldb update check - report only; never install -- ldb update force - reinstall upstream regardless of version -- ============================================================================= local function parse_upstream_version(page) return string.match(page, '<plugin[^>]-version="([0-9%.]+)"') end
-- Compare dotted-decimal versions ("9.10" > "9.2"); returns -1/0/1 local function compare_versions(a, b) local function parts(v) local r = {} for n in tostring(v):gmatch("(%d+)") do table.insert(r, tonumber(n)) end return r end local pa, pb = parts(a), parts(b) for i = 1, math.max(#pa, #pb) do local ai, bi = pa[i] or 0, pb[i] or 0 if ai ~= bi then return ai < bi and -1 or 1 end end return 0 end
local function install_upstream(page, upstream_version, current_version) local file_path = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 6) local f, err = io.open(file_path, "w") if not f then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Failed to open plugin file for writing: " .. tostring(err)) return end f:write(page) f:close() ColourNote("green", "", string.format("%sUpdated v%s -> v%s. Reloading...", PREFIX, current_version, upstream_version)) trigger_reload() end
function ldb_update(name, line, wildcards) if not async_ok then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "async library not available; cannot fetch update.") return end
local mode = wildcards[1] or "" -- "", "check", or "force" ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Fetching " .. UPDATE_URL .. "...")
async.doAsyncRemoteRequest(UPDATE_URL, function(retval, page, status, headers, full_status, request_url) if status ~= 200 then ColourNote("red", "", string.format("%sFetch failed: HTTP %s", PREFIX, tostring(status))) return end if not page or page == "" then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Empty response.") return end
local upstream_version = parse_upstream_version(page) if not upstream_version then ColourNote("red", "", PREFIX .. "Could not parse upstream version from XML.") return end
local current_version = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) local cmp = compare_versions(upstream_version, current_version)
if mode == "check" then if cmp == 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format("%sUp to date (v%s).", PREFIX, current_version)) elseif cmp < 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format( "%sLocal v%s is newer than upstream v%s (no install).", PREFIX, current_version, upstream_version)) else ColourNote("yellow", "", string.format( "%sUpdate available: v%s -> v%s. Run 'ldb update' to install.", PREFIX, current_version, upstream_version)) end return end
if mode == "force" then install_upstream(page, upstream_version, current_version) return end
-- Bare 'ldb update': only install if upstream is strictly newer if cmp == 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format("%sUp to date (v%s).", PREFIX, current_version)) return elseif cmp < 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", string.format( "%sLocal v%s is newer than upstream v%s. Use 'ldb update force' to downgrade.", PREFIX, current_version, upstream_version)) return end
install_upstream(page, upstream_version, current_version) end, "HTTPS") end
-- ============================================================================= -- Plugin lifecycle -- ============================================================================= function OnPluginInstall() enabled = (GetVariable("enabled") == "true") open_db()
-- Read current GMCP state (may have been broadcast before plugin load/reload) local base = gmcp("char.base") if base then if base.perlevel then cached_perlevel = tonumber(base.perlevel) or 1000 end if base.tier then cached_tier = tonumber(base.tier) end if base.remorts then cached_remorts = tonumber(base.remorts) end if base.redos then cached_redos = tonumber(base.redos) end if base.pups then cached_pups = tonumber(base.pups) end end last_pup_event_id = nil -- Clear stale pup train tracking on reload
local status = gmcp("char.status") if status then local new_level = tonumber(status.level) local new_tnl = tonumber(status.tnl) if new_level and new_level ~= -1 then cached_level = new_level end if new_tnl and new_tnl ~= -1 then cached_tnl = new_tnl end cached_enemy = status.enemy or "" end
local room = gmcp("room.info") if room then cached_zone = room.zone cached_room_num = tonumber(room.num) cached_room_name = room.name end
-- Restore active quest/campaign IDs from saved state local saved_quest = GetVariable("active_quest_id") if saved_quest and saved_quest ~= "" then active_quest_id = tonumber(saved_quest) end local saved_campaign = GetVariable("active_campaign_id") if saved_campaign and saved_campaign ~= "" then active_campaign_id = tonumber(saved_campaign) end local saved_gquest = GetVariable("active_gquest_id") if saved_gquest and saved_gquest ~= "" then active_gquest_id = tonumber(saved_gquest) end
-- Check quest status via GMCP (handler already sent request quest on connect) local quest_data = gmcp("comm.quest") if quest_data then handle_quest(quest_data) end
-- Schedule delayed cp info / gq info checks to detect/reconcile in-progress activities if enabled then DoAfterSpecial(2, "delayed_cp_info()", 12) -- 12 = sendto.script DoAfterSpecial(3, "delayed_gq_info()", 12) -- 3s to avoid overlap with cp info ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Loaded (enabled).") else ColourNote("cyan", "", PREFIX .. "Loaded (disabled). Use 'ldb on' to start collecting data.") end end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("enabled", tostring(enabled)) SetVariable("active_quest_id", active_quest_id and tostring(active_quest_id) or "") SetVariable("active_campaign_id", active_campaign_id and tostring(active_campaign_id) or "") SetVariable("active_gquest_id", active_gquest_id and tostring(active_gquest_id) or "") end
function OnPluginClose() close_db() end
function OnPluginDisconnect() if in_combat then end_combat() end end
